"story.season.province_23.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_00","真是...不可思議。不可能。弱小的軍隊不可能走了那麼遠！"
"story.season.province_23.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_01","我們有意志和信念去做別人沒有做過的事情。我們要毀掉你們。"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","不！你做了什麼？我的身體正在消失！啊！！！"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你已經不行了。你的暗黑力量正在離開你。"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我們已經徹底打敗了你和你的軍隊！"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","......這......還......不是......終點......"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","也許不是，因為暗黑力量無論如何還會尋找新的家園。但這就是你的終點。"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","終於到家了。我覺得是時候慶祝一下了！"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","是的！酒館裡有來自整個帝國的美味食物，自由民族的代表們正在來的路上。"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","一切聽起來都很不錯。我們終於可以休息一下了。"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","尤其是你，司令。是你的策略和意志帶我們走出了最暗黑的時刻。"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","是你重建城堡的決心鼓勵了我們。"
"story.season.province_23.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","我們都很感激你。前面還有新的挑戰，我們先慶祝這次的勝利吧！"
"story.season.province_3.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_00","艾琳娜，我們又見面了。你好像找到了新的盟友。"
"story.season.province_3.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_01","是的，我們會一起終結你在這些陸地的邪惡統治！"
"story.season.province_3.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_02","那是不可能的。你們還不夠強大，影響不了我的統治。"
"story.season.province_3.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_03","走著瞧！"
"story.season.province_4.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_00","嗯...只有我這麼覺得，還是現在我們城堡裡的老鼠真的少了？現在好...乾淨。"
"story.season.province_4.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_01","軍隊在行進時，我們要完成自己的任務，奪回帝國。我抓到一對冰霜貓頭鷹，訓練牠們抓害蟲。"
"story.season.province_4.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_02","額...冰霜貓頭鷹？強壯到可以載人嗎？你確定牠們已經被馴服了嗎？"
"story.season.province_4.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_03","絕對肯定！牠們也很可愛呢！"
"story.season.province_5.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_00","司令！這個消息我只告訴你。"
"story.season.province_5.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_01","我打敗艾琳娜的時候，她正和國王在一起。我沒有殺掉國王 ......我只是給他機會投靠我。"
"story.season.province_5.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_02","如果你繼續走這條路，你也會被打敗。到那時，如果我還能仁慈，也會給你一樣的選擇。要麼投靠我，要麼死。"
"story.season.province_5.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_03","記住這些話。你現在所做的一切都是徒勞。"
"story.season.province_6.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_00","我們進行得很順利。部隊的士氣高漲。"
"story.season.province_6.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_01","誰說不是呢？我們打敗了暗黑領主的部隊！"
"story.season.province_7.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_00","見到你真好，艾琳娜。你看起來很疲憊，發生什麼事了？"
"story.season.province_7.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_01","謝謝你的關心，薇薇卡。一切都在預料之中。面對戰鬥不能掉以輕心，前面的路還很長。"
"story.season.province_7.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_02","很棒。我們在基地裡會盡全力支援戰役！"
"story.season.province_8.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_00","你真以為自己還有希望往前走嗎？和我帝國裡的盟友與小兵比起來，你的小戰隊不值一提。"
"story.season.province_8.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_01","我們的力量在壯大，你這個魔鬼。你剩下的日子不多了！"
"story.season.province_9.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_00","叛軍在繼續前行...他們離末日不遠了。"
"story.season.province_9.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_01","是的，領主...他們會在你面前倒下。然後他們會明白，必須為你效勞。"
"story.season.province_9.0.onlevelunlocked.dialog_02","就像我一樣..."
"story.season.s2_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們必須找到這個秘密訊息的發送人。"
"story.season.s2_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這座島的海岸全是怪獸！"
"story.season.s2_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","它們比暗黑領主指揮的怪獸還要野蠻..."
"story.season.s2_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","看有沒有人能在這奇怪的新地方做我們的嚮導！"
"story.season.s2_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","看，一個海港小鎮！我們也許能找到人幫忙。"
"story.season.s2_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","哈囉！你看起來一點也不像這裡的人。"
"story.season.s2_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我是一個船長，我對這片海域瞭如指掌。"
"story.season.s2_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我能幫你們找到訊息的發送者...但不能白幫忙！什麼意思？"
"story.season.s2_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","好吧，我們需要幫助。我懷疑她是否可信..."
"story.season.s2_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","你收到的訊息真是不尋常。"
"story.season.s2_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","訊息裡提到的亞特蘭蒂斯在哪裡？"
"story.season.s2_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我知道有人也許能幫上忙。"
"story.season.s2_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","很難找到我們要找的人。"
"story.season.s2_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們繼續向前走吧。我確定，如果他聽了我們的目的，就一定會幫助我們的。"
"story.season.s2_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","有人一直在叢林裡盯著我們。"
"story.season.s2_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","是的。我們還沒找到這個人，他就已經找到了我們。"
"story.season.s2_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","米桑德拉！你這個騙子！我警告你不要再靠近我的土地！"
"story.season.s2_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","額...我想他還在生我的氣。你來幫助我戰鬥，真是我的幸運，對嗎？"
"story.season.s2_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","塔拉克！夥計！我們來談一談！"
"story.season.s2_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你們必須馬上離開！我不會你相信你說的任何話。"
"story.season.s2_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","他為什麼那麼沮喪？"
"story.season.s2_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","額，我們一起玩牌...我碰巧贏了。"
"story.season.s2_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","他輸掉了一個傳家寶。對他來說很重要。"
"story.season.s2_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","這...可能比我們想的還要棘手！"
"story.season.s2_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","塔拉克，這個本來應該幫助我們的人，還在氣頭上。"
"story.season.s2_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","真抱歉。他的族人不會輕易原諒。"
"story.season.s2_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們可以做點什麼，來證明我們可以幫助他的族人嗎？"
"story.season.s2_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我知道怎麼做了！把那些怪獸趕出這片土地！"
"story.season.s2_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","展現我們的實力？嗯，那也許是塔拉克真正想要的。"
"story.season.s2_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","成群的怪獸，多得數不清。"
"story.season.s2_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們上。塔拉克一定會很快注意到我們。"
"story.season.s2_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","你們粉碎掉的怪獸，比我想得還多。"
"story.season.s2_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","真是幫了我的族人一個大忙。可你們為什麼要這樣做？"
"story.season.s2_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","塔拉克，我知道你很生我的氣。但這些冒險者真的需要你幫忙去找一個人。"
"story.season.s2_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","...米桑德拉，我不會輕易忘記你之前犯下的過錯。我必須好好想想。"
"story.season.s2_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","噢。我感覺戰鬥的時候被一隻怪獸咬了..."
"story.season.s2_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","快讓我看一看。"
"story.season.s2_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","傷口中毒了...但我沒見過這種毒。"
"story.season.s2_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我不能讓你就這麼死在這裡。"
"story.season.s2_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","唯一的解藥在叢林裡。跟我來！"
"story.season.s2_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","毒性開始發作了。我快走不動了。"
"story.season.s2_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","雖然我還是不信任你們。但我必須讓你活著。"
"story.season.s2_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","附近有一個神聖瀑布。瀑布水可以治療被邪惡毒液侵襲的傷口。"
"story.season.s2_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","米桑德拉的情況很不妙。我們快走！"
"story.season.s2_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我們到神聖瀑布了。快喝水！"
"story.season.s2_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","不...知...道...它...有沒有...用..."
"story.season.s2_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","她快不省人事了。剛剛她還能喝水。"
"story.season.s2_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","現在我們必須等一等。"
"story.season.s2_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","如果她夠強壯，你們的意志夠偉大，她就會痊愈並醒過來。"
"story.season.s2_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","米桑德拉已經睡了幾個星期。"
"story.season.s2_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","不知道毒效有沒有散去。"
"story.season.s2_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我的治療魔法還不起作用。"
"story.season.s2_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","你們那麼辛苦地照顧米桑德拉，讓我印象深刻。"
"story.season.s2_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","米桑德拉醒了！"
"story.season.s2_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","呃，我感覺已經睡了好多年。"
"story.season.s2_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","差不多了！你終於醒過來了，太好了。"
"story.season.s2_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我可能誤會你了，米桑德拉。你和你的同伴帶著榮耀而戰。"
"story.season.s2_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","謝謝你，塔拉克。你不生氣了就好。"
"story.season.s2_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","那現在該怎麼辦？"
"story.season.s2_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我可以幫助你們。"
"story.season.s2_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","拿上你們的東西跟我走。前面有很長的一段路。"
"story.season.s2_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這個叢林真大！希望塔拉克知道方向..."
"story.season.s2_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們到底要去哪裡？"
"story.season.s2_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我們要去迷失環礁湖。離這裡不遠。"
"story.season.s2_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我聽說那裡有一個特別的人。"
"story.season.s2_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","快到了。準備好吧。"
"story.season.s2_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我很感恩，現在我們是朋友了。這裡真的有什麼特別嗎？"
"story.season.s2_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","相信我。叢林的眼睛和耳朵從來沒讓我失望過。"
"story.season.s2_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","哇...這個環礁湖好漂亮！"
"story.season.s2_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們可沒有時間欣賞風景！有人在靠近！"
"story.season.s2_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你們好，遠道而來的遊客。我是艾利爾，亞特蘭蒂斯的公主。"
"story.season.s2_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","讓你們來這裡，是因為我需要你們的幫助。是時候把一切告訴你們了。"
"story.season.s2_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","讓你們知道我為什麼離家出走。還有我的父親，國王波塞冬的瘋狂。"
"story.season.s2_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","謝謝你告訴我們這些。你已經有能力面對即將發生的一切。"
"story.season.s2_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","是的。請允許我把故事說完。"
"story.season.s2_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我來自亞特蘭蒂斯帝國。我的父親，波塞冬，維護了帝國幾個世紀的和平。"
"story.season.s2_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","但他發起了與地表世界的戰爭，帝國便不再和平。"
"story.season.s2_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我們稍後繼續說。希望你們會游泳。"
"story.season.s2_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","這條路線通往亞特蘭蒂斯的秘境..."
"story.season.s2_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","咳！咳！游泳的時候，我已經喝掉了半個海洋的水！"
"story.season.s2_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我精疲力盡了！神秘學院可沒有水下課程！"
"story.season.s2_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你們都是從陸地上來的，已經很厲害了。先休息一下，我們還要去海底。"
"story.season.s2_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","嘿，公主，你好像遇到了麻煩。"
"story.season.s2_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這個麻煩可能會讓你陷入困境！"
"story.season.s2_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","是的，整個群島危機四伏。"
"story.season.s2_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","簡直難以相信...叢林裡四處黑暗，就像夜晚一樣。"
"story.season.s2_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","有可能是我的父親波塞冬讓這裡變成了一片黑暗！"
"story.season.s2_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我發現他有些不對勁。他召集軍隊發起戰爭，和他曾經信仰的一切剛好相反！"
"story.season.s2_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我擔心有人在控制我的父親。我需要你們幫忙找出真相。"
"story.season.s2_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們在閻摩帝國的邊境上。他們以強大的軍力為傲。"
"story.season.s2_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我在這裡做過很多次生意。只要遵守他們的法律，做生意就很容易。"
"story.season.s2_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","額，我怎麼沒看到生命的跡象。人們都到哪裡去了？"
"story.season.s2_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","有人在靠近..."
"story.season.s2_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","親愛的遊客，歡迎你們的到來..."
"story.season.s2_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","乖乖放下武器投降，交出值錢的東西。"
"story.season.s2_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我們不會投降的！準備戰鬥吧！"
"story.season.s2_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","你們不是普通的遊客！"
"story.season.s2_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你說得沒錯，女士！我們是來拯救這裡的！"
"story.season.s2_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","真勇敢，但也真愚蠢！主人，我們找到公主了！"
"story.season.s2_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","啊...亞特蘭蒂斯公主。她來了。太好了。"
"story.season.s2_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","怎麼回事？這些陸地的領主曾經發誓要與亞特蘭蒂斯和平相處！"
"story.season.s2_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","現在我才是這裡的領主，我代表這裡的法律！你們活不過今天！"
"story.season.s2_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","光子！抓住公主為什麼要這麼長時間？"
"story.season.s2_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","領主！她的隊伍比預期的要強大。"
"story.season.s2_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","呸！你的職責是打敗他們，不是找藉口！"
"story.season.s2_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","遵命，領主。"
"story.season.s2_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","英雄們，你們打得不錯。但你們早晚會犯錯！"
"story.season.s2_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","錯的是你！"
"story.season.s2_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你和你的老闆弄錯了對手！"
"story.season.s2_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","好戰領主給住在這裡的子民們帶來了很多苦難。"
"story.season.s2_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","但他為什麼要找艾利爾？"
"story.season.s2_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我也想知道。難道凱基布拉多和我的父親在一塊？"
"story.season.s2_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","農場已被洗劫。凱基布拉多在背後指使了一切嗎？"
"story.season.s2_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","真不明白一個人為什麼要毀掉自己的土地。"
"story.season.s2_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","看來凱基布拉多並不是一個最明智的領主。"
"story.season.s2_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們需要讓他恢復些理智！"
"story.season.s2_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","又一個村莊被毀掉了...不，等等！還有人住在這裡！"
"story.season.s2_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","是的，但我看到邊界上有一些士兵。他們準備襲擊村莊了！"
"story.season.s2_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們又見面了，英雄們。我的命令很清楚：毀掉村莊！"
"story.season.s2_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","不過我還是很願意與你一戰。俘獲可憐的村民算不上什麼榮耀。"
"story.season.s2_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","哈哈！我們又打敗你了！村莊安全了！"
"story.season.s2_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","打得好！我得撤退了..."
"story.season.s2_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","今天沒有人可以撤退！光子，沒想到你這麼無能！"
"story.season.s2_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","領主！我不是那個意思..."
"story.season.s2_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","閉嘴，你這個笨蛋！我無法再信任你了。"
"story.season.s2_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","凱基布拉多用他的詛咒之劍擊倒了光子！"
"story.season.s2_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","不要！沒有...想到...會是這樣...結束。"
"story.season.s2_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我受了重傷。凱基布拉多用他的詛咒之劍擊倒了我..."
"story.season.s2_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","暗黑力量在這裡作亂。"
"story.season.s2_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","光子...我得問問你。凱基布拉多一直都是這個樣子嗎？"
"story.season.s2_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","不是的，不久前發生了一些事。有一個來自海洋的男人..."
"story.season.s2_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","波塞冬！"
"story.season.s2_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","..."
"story.season.s2_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","她昏過去了。恐怕她沒那麼快會醒過來。"
"story.season.s2_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","雖然我不願意相信，但我的父親肯定和這裡的暗黑命運有所連結。"
"story.season.s2_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們已經走了很遠來到這裡。"
"story.season.s2_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","領主還有很多士兵。"
"story.season.s2_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","不管他派誰來，我們都能打敗。"
"story.season.s2_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","朋友，你真勇敢。看看他們是不是真的厲害！"
"story.season.s2_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","嘿，有件事一直困擾我。"
"story.season.s2_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","凱基布拉多的暗黑力量和暗黑領主的好像。"
"story.season.s2_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","是有一些相似。但我沒有察覺到與暗黑領主有什麼直接連結。"
"story.season.s2_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","很奇怪的是，波塞冬會是這股暗黑力量的來源。"
"story.season.s2_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","沒錯。亞特蘭蒂斯是一個強大的帝國，但我們的力量來自海洋，而不是黑暗。"
"story.season.s2_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我猜，我們必須盡快見到領主才能找到真相..."
"story.season.s2_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們終於達到閻摩帝國的首都了！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","你們這群多管閒事的蠢貨！你們以為自己有什麼成就了嗎，真是天真！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們打敗了你的兵，沒有上千也有上百！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","這裡沒有人會支持你。"
"story.season.s2_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","老兄，你的統治就要結束了！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","不！永遠不會！這不是真的！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我要把你們全部打敗！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","暗黑力量...正在離開我..."
"story.season.s2_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","活該！帝國不再受你控制了！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","不..."
"story.season.s2_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","他已經完蛋了。現在我們終於可以去亞特蘭蒂斯了！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","...港口傳來的是什麼聲音？"
"story.season.s2_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我感覺有東西在靠近！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","波塞冬從海裡浮現！"
"story.season.s2_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","你們這些凡人，向亞特蘭蒂斯的威力投降吧！"
"story.season.s2_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","父親！你為什麼要這樣做？"
"story.season.s2_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","陸地族人裡有惡魔。"
"story.season.s2_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們海裡的族人必須先發制人才能自保！"
"story.season.s2_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","但那沒有任何意義。我們和這些人沒有仇恨。"
"story.season.s2_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","女兒，你為什麼要和這些人一起戰鬥？"
"story.season.s2_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","為什麼要與我作對？"
"story.season.s2_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","在我們的旅程中，這些英雄展現了他們的榮耀。"
"story.season.s2_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","錯的人是你，父親！懇求你收起憤怒！"
"story.season.s2_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","不可能！我做的一切都是為了正義！"
"story.season.s2_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們抵抗住了波塞冬。"
"story.season.s2_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","他還會再攻擊的，在他眼裡能看到熾熱的瘋狂！"
"story.season.s2_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們離開這個海岸吧。這裡太危險了。"
"story.season.s2_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","有誰知道該如何對抗這個海洋的統治者嗎？"
"story.season.s2_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","額...叢林裡的遠古英靈有時能看到我們凡人看不到的東西。"
"story.season.s2_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","那我們去找這些幽靈吧？"
"story.season.s2_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","啊，不是幽靈。是英靈。我們要深入內陸去尋找他們。"
"story.season.s2_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","塔拉克，你確定這些幽靈會和我們說話嗎？他們友好嗎？"
"story.season.s2_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這些英靈曾經無數次幫助過我的部落。"
"story.season.s2_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","只要我們能找到他們，一定會幫忙的。"
"story.season.s2_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我感覺現在離你的土地已經很遠了。"
"story.season.s2_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","是的，我們走了很遠。但我能感覺到英靈的存在了。"
"story.season.s2_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這些遠古遺跡充滿了神秘能量！"
"story.season.s2_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們來對地方了！我必須呼喚英靈了！"
"story.season.s2_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","小心！"
"story.season.s2_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","..."
"story.season.s2_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","[#1e77ff]我們是部落英靈。我們一直在關注你。[#]"
"story.season.s2_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","[#1e77ff]你們想要阻止海洋領主嗎？非常好...[#]"
"story.season.s2_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","[#1e77ff]波塞冬被邪惡力量操控了。[#]"
"story.season.s2_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","[#1e77ff]這個力量來自亞特蘭蒂斯之下最黑暗的深淵！[#]"
"story.season.s2_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","發生了什麼？為什麼每個人都盯著我看？"
"story.season.s2_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","英靈附身於你說話了！"
"story.season.s2_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","真好。他們說了什麼？"
"story.season.s2_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","波塞冬被亞特蘭蒂斯之下的某種東西操控了！"
"story.season.s2_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","深淵裡有許多秘密。"
"story.season.s2_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","如果能控制我的父親，真是太可怕了！"
"story.season.s2_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","為了救我的父親，我們必須去亞特蘭蒂斯的宮殿！"
"story.season.s2_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","宮殿裡有什麼？"
"story.season.s2_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","那裡有一個秘密通道，可以去往禁閉深淵。"
"story.season.s2_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","讓我父親變得瘋狂的原因就在那裡！"
"story.season.s2_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","所以計劃是攻破波塞冬的軍隊，然後在宮殿裡遇神殺神，遇鬼殺鬼？"
"story.season.s2_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我同意！"
"story.season.s2_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","通過在島上冒險，我們去了很多地方。"
"story.season.s2_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","是的，沒想到旅程這麼長。還這麼危險..."
"story.season.s2_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","這裡的怪獸戰鬥很兇猛！"
"story.season.s2_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我覺得還會遇到更多怪獸..."
"story.season.s2_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我們離亞特蘭蒂斯城越來越近了。"
"story.season.s2_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我猜我們不能和平地進去？"
"story.season.s2_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","不能，一定會有戰鬥。我父親一定衝突戰鬥的！"
"story.season.s2_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","你們這些陸地來的人，還想進入亞特蘭蒂斯嗎？"
"story.season.s2_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","你們不會得逞的。我要把你們打得粉碎。你們就不會再給我的國度帶來危險！"
"story.season.s2_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","父親！我知道你被控制了！我們必須進去，拯救你和我們的國度！"
"story.season.s2_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我一定要阻止任何想進宮殿的人。我的女兒也不例外！"
"story.season.s2_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我被...打敗了。我必須阻止任何人...往前走..."
"story.season.s2_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我覺得他還沒有恢復理智！"
"story.season.s2_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","強大的波塞冬現在看起來真可憐！被一小群路過的英雄打敗了！"
"story.season.s2_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","你是誰？你對我的父親做了什麼？"
"story.season.s2_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","可愛的公主，來我的國度尋找真相吧。哈哈哈！"
"story.season.s2_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們來到的這座城是我的家鄉。它已不再是過去的樣子了。"
"story.season.s2_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","是的，這個地方讓人毛骨悚然，還有好多怪獸。老實講，和我想像的家鄉不太一樣。"
"story.season.s2_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們在城外遇到的一切，源頭都在這裡。"
"story.season.s2_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","讓亞特蘭蒂斯都充滿恐懼與危險！"
"story.season.s2_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","親愛的冒險者們，歡迎..."
"story.season.s2_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","歡迎來到黑暗深淵帝國！"
"story.season.s2_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","這是先祖的歡迎！你是誰？"
"story.season.s2_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","哈哈哈！波塞冬把我封鎖了幾個世紀。"
"story.season.s2_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我是尤塞娜，深淵女王，是海洋的真正統治者！"
"story.season.s2_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","尤塞娜在耍我們，派了腐化的亞特蘭蒂斯兵力來拖慢我們。"
"story.season.s2_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","尤塞娜散發出邪惡的氣息。"
"story.season.s2_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","你說的沒錯。她真是條爛魚！"
"story.season.s2_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我覺得尤塞娜還沒有使出全部力量。"
"story.season.s2_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我在古籍裡讀到過她的故事，她法力無邊。"
"story.season.s2_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我們處於劣勢。在水下戰鬥對我們來說很危險！"
"story.season.s2_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們就快到宮殿了！"
"story.season.s2_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","噢，你們走到這裡來了。我以為你們已經死了。"
"story.season.s2_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","沒關係。很快我就能夠統治整個世界了！"
"story.season.s2_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我們走著瞧，你這個虛偽的女巫！"
"story.season.s2_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我們的島嶼被你荼毒很久了。今天這一切都將結束！"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這是什麼話？你們怎麼可能阻止我，我可是深淵女王！"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","沒錯，女士，這就是你邪惡計劃的終點！"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","她墜向深淵了！"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","謝謝你，我的孩子！她的暗黑法力再也不能支配我了。"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","父親！你還好嗎？"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","是的，我終於恢復自己的意識了。謝謝你們，勇敢的英雄。"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","很榮幸我們能幫助海洋領主。"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","是的，真難得有機會參加這樣的冒險。"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","想想看，一切都開始於一個玻璃瓶裡的訊息！"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","誰能想到是這樣偉大的任務？"
"story.season.s2_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","我要再一次謝謝你們。你們的勇氣拯救了亞特蘭蒂斯與群島！"
"story.season.s3_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","大家還好嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我每次穿越傳送門都還是會頭暈！"
"story.season.s3_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","和我曾穿越過的任何傳送門都不一樣。原始未經加工。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我比較擔心的是這個地方。我們在哪裡？威脅我們家園的就是這裡嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","好吧，這個地方絕對就是我們先前感覺到的震動根源。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我感受到敵人逐漸逼近......受到從未遇過的黑暗力量影響。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","戰鬥！"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","哈囉，旅行者。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你好！"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你是誰？這裡是哪裡？"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我是阿格尼斯，這是我兄弟比約恩。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","歡迎來到密德嘉。是我的傳送門將你們帶到了這裡。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","你們穿越了那個傳送門，從別的世界來到這裡？"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","說到傳送門，我有話要說......"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","你「聽見」了聲音，而且覺得一切都在打轉吧？幾分鐘就會好了。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","......你們是這英雄，因為有某個陰暗的威脅現在擴及了所有的世界，包括你們的世界。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","解釋一下吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","宇宙失去了平衡。你是魔法師吧？你一定感覺到了。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","......的確。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","請跟我們同行，我們在路上會進一步說明。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","......"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","很快......我們很快就衝突戰鬥。"
"story.season.s3_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","那個陰暗的人影消失了。"
"story.season.s3_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","阿格尼斯跟比約恩，你們剛剛提到威脅？"
"story.season.s3_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","她一天到晚把威脅跟危險掛在嘴邊，那是她的專長。"
"story.season.s3_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我是先知的女兒。眾神賜予了我預視的能力。"
"story.season.s3_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","那你最近看到了什麼？"
"story.season.s3_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","但是最近的幻象呢？什麼都沒有。眾神沉默了。"
"story.season.s3_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","呵呵呵呵......"
"story.season.s3_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","哈哈哈，哈！"
"story.season.s3_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","笨蛋，你什麼麼都不知道！"
"story.season.s3_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","小兵！殺死這些弱雞！"
"story.season.s3_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","可惡，我們跟丟了。那是誰？"
"story.season.s3_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","安-維德，黑暗力量的僕人。"
"story.season.s3_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","這個「安-維德」控制著我們的敵人。"
"story.season.s3_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","對。他似乎獲得了某些權力。"
"story.season.s3_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","約頓海姆的冰雪巨人之王尤彌爾似乎晉升了他。"
"story.season.s3_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","冰巨人之王！好酷的頭銜！"
"story.season.s3_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","他一點也不酷。安-維德晉升也不是什麼好事。這表示黑暗力量變得更囂張了。"
"story.season.s3_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","這就是眾神沉默下來的原因......"
"story.season.s3_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","那我們就必須找到這些神，聽聽祂們自己有什麼話說。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","要讓眾神聽你一言可不容易。但是......"
"story.season.s3_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","哈！你會喜歡她接下來要說的話的！"
"story.season.s3_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我知道一個地方，可以遇見曾經是神的人。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","「曾經是」神？"
"story.season.s3_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","阿格尼斯一直想跟神見面。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我對他的興趣純粹是學術上的。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你們應該讀讀阿格尼斯寫的學術情歌才對。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","這個曾經是神的人在哪裡？"
"story.season.s3_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","他通常待在這座沼澤附近......"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","曾經是神的人！出來吧！"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","「曾經是」？真是的。神格沒有所謂的過去式。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","嘿，比約恩，這個怪傢伙是誰？"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","洛基。戲法師。眾神之父奧丁的養子。因為殺了奧丁的兒子巴德爾而被流放。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","眾神現在緘口不言，祂們無力持續將我流放。所以囉，小可愛們，請容我告退......"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","等等！告訴我們，為什麼眾神保持沉默？擴及九大王國的黑暗力量是什麼？"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","嗯......哼。你們可還沒證明自己有獲知這項資訊的價值。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","到華納海姆來見我。如果你們能夠生存下來，我們就可以談談。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","他消失了......"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","不！"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","我倒想學學這把戲！"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","他說「生存下來」是什麼意思？"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","有隻毛茸茸的小動物突然從樹叢裡竄出來。"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我帶來了消息與警告！"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","是會走路的老鼠！？"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","是會說話的老鼠！？"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","這是神使拉塔托斯克。拉塔托斯克，我以為你會和你的主人一樣保持沉默！"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","安-維德正在集結大軍！大軍會從華納海姆進軍！警報！警報！密德嘉將會陷落！"
"story.season.s3_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_18","有我在就別想得逞。全副武裝！"
"story.season.s3_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","敵人的軍隊就在那裡！"
"story.season.s3_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","阿格尼斯！集結你的密德嘉同胞！我們會將這支軍隊連圖安-維德一起擊退！"
"story.season.s3_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","好，比約恩！我們就去把那些怪獸的腦袋都敲碎吧！"
"story.season.s3_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","順便打斷幾根骨頭？"
"story.season.s3_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","好主意！我們也要打斷幾根骨頭！"
"story.season.s3_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","那是最後一頭怪獸了。阿格尼斯，你的密德嘉盟友狀況如何？"
"story.season.s3_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","就憑安-維德和他那些小嘍囉可打不倒我們。"
"story.season.s3_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","他們是從那個方向來的。在那些高山之後。"
"story.season.s3_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","對，是華納海姆。如果我喜歡打賭......而我的確喜歡，我會說安-維德已經征服那裡了。"
"story.season.s3_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","洛基要我們在那裡跟他碰面......在那裡現在是敵方的地盤。"
"story.season.s3_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我們唯一的選擇就是繼續前進。就算是現在，我還是能感覺到九大王國的國土在腳下顫動。"
"story.season.s3_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","我們必須找出這裡發生了什麼事！我們的世界也正受到威脅！"
"story.season.s3_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","是真的。就連我都能感覺到。事情非常非常糟。"
"story.season.s3_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","那麼就去華納海姆吧，找到洛基和答案。"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","所以，這就是華納海姆？"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","對。這裡是「瓦尼爾」的王國，他們都是巫術與預言的大師。"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","......這個地方充滿了魔法，一切都是由魔法塑造的。我......我從未見過如此美麗的景象。"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","等到你去過亞爾夫海姆再說吧。那些巫師真的很懂得造景。"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","保持警戒！安-維德知道我們會來。"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","那我們在華納海姆就有兩個目標......"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","擊敗安-維德，並查出洛基知道的內情。"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","洛基除非有樂子，否則不會出現。"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","他肯定會以看我們為自己生存而戰取樂......"
"story.season.s3_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","那我們就好好表演給他看！"
"story.season.s3_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","看起來安-維德不在這裡。"
"story.season.s3_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","如果我是安-維德，我會想要佔據一個制高點，一個有風景的地方，然後看著我們。"
"story.season.s3_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","很合理。跟我來吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","就是那裡，古老的瓦尼爾鷹巢。我就是在哪裡得到了先知的能力。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","天啊。我仍然可以聽到他們的歌，來自很久以前......"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","這裡的魔力很強。女巫，你聽到了什麼其他聲音？"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","嗯......我聽到......我聽到......"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","很快，我的國王。很快，你的新世界就將誕生！"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","你話太多了，你這僕人。入侵者來了。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","他們什麼都不是，我的國王。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","馬上殺了他們。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","殺啊！是的，陛下。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","今天是華納海姆，明天......是無數的世界。奴僕們！攻擊！"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","噢，不！我可以看到他們在發動攻擊！"
"story.season.s3_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","噢，好耶！有更多怪獸可以扁了！"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這裡是鷹巢，屬於古代知識的地方。它被被安-維德玷汙了......"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","阿格尼斯，我覺得這裡是可以再次淨化的，現在只是暫時受到了侮辱。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","洛基憑空出現了......又來了。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","對，瓦尼爾真的是製造奇蹟的能手。如果他們出錯，肯定是有人從中作梗。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","某個低能的傻子，像是安-維德那種人。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","洛基，我們照你的遊戲規則走了，現在告訴我們吧，究竟發生什麼事了？"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","九大王國為何顫動？我們的家園也受到影響嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","哦，我想安-維德可以說明得比我更完整。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","不，等等......！"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","他又不見了。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","如果他說安-維德有答案，那就表示我們必須找到安-維德。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","在我的預視中，我聽見安-維德和他的主子冰雪巨人之王尤彌爾說話。"
"story.season.s3_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","那我們上吧。安-維德一定就在不遠處！"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","他......"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","在......"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","那裡！"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","哈！我可是所向無敵的安-維德，整個宇宙都在我面前顫動！而你們竟敢挑戰我？"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","讓世界顫動的才不是他！是他的主人......真正的掌權者。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","告訴我們，尤彌爾釋放出的黑暗是什麼？"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你最好自己看一看。對。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我的王要你們死......我要把你們全都串在世界之樹上。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","這樣你們就可以親眼見證我的王正在創造的恐懼榮景。他會聽到你們的尖叫，而且會對我很滿意。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","我們還要繼續聽下去嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我敬謝不敏。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","打敗他！"
"story.season.s3_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","奴僕們！阻止他們！"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","嗯......你把他殺了。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","反正跟他聊天很無聊。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","安-維德什麼有用的資訊都沒說。我們都靠你了，洛基。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","靠我這小老頭嗎？我可以如何協助你們這樣偉大的英雄呢？"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","鬧夠了！尤彌爾在打什麼主意，我們該如何制止他？"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","哦，拜託......冰王才沒有聰明到能策劃這種事。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","你是說尤彌爾正在......跟其他的神合作嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我們怎麼可能阻止神？更別說是很多個神了？"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","你們知道我為什麼會被流放嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","拜託，她知道關於你的所有故事。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","你殺了你的兄弟。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","那是意外，不是所有人都相信我。他叫巴德爾，是奧丁最愛的兒子。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","根據記載......就是提到我被收養的種種的那些......，他是我同父異母的兄弟。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我們沒有時間說這些！"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","我想你們是有的，親愛的。如果你夠聰明才能知道我想告訴你什麼。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","巴德爾曾是個神。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","......然後他死了。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","而我只是半個神，充其量就是半個。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_18","神會死。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_19","甜心，神會被殺死。被像你們這樣到處都是的無名小卒。"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_20","而你說我們應該殺了在這幕後操弄一切的那些神嗎？這樣足以阻止他們的計劃嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_21","恐怕你們只有一種方法可以知道了。祝你們好運！"
"story.season.s3_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","好。重要的事先討論。陌生人，你們知道「約頓海姆」是什麼意思嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","「免費擁抱的土地」？"
"story.season.s3_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","是「巨人的世界」。"
"story.season.s3_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","啊。"
"story.season.s3_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","那裡由冰雪巨人之王尤彌爾統治，這就是為什麼那地方比阿格尼斯的幽默感還要冷的原因。"
"story.season.s3_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我們一直在靠近一個強大的力量來源。"
"story.season.s3_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","對，我們很接近了。"
"story.season.s3_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","顯然尤彌爾並不希望被打擾。"
"story.season.s3_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","啊......是一次小震動嗎？我可以感覺到某種痛苦。"
"story.season.s3_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","有東西正在呼救。是某個......巨大的東西。"
"story.season.s3_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","這可能比我想像的還要糟糕。我們要動作快。"
"story.season.s3_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","薇薇卡。你感到非常痛苦。是從哪裡來的？"
"story.season.s3_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","那......那邊。"
"story.season.s3_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","那麼那邊就是我們必須去的地方。"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","他們開始展開更激烈的戰鬥了。"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","他們在這裡一定有什麼東西不希望我們發現。"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","啊！你......你感覺到了嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","對。我們都感覺到了。"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","另一場震動。比之前的更大。"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","情況越來越糟了。"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","阿格尼斯。你是不是有什麼沒告訴我們？"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","原諒我。我不是想騙你們。只是......"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","警報！警報！"
"story.season.s3_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","眾神的信使看起來不像是在傳遞好消息。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","拉塔托斯克。恐怕我知道你要來告訴我們什麼。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","是尤彌爾！他想讓死者復生，而他的妻子想讓生者死去！"
"story.season.s3_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我完全不懂。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","尤彌爾的計畫成功了嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","差一點！他差點就要成功了！"
"story.season.s3_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","阿格尼斯......你是不是有什麼沒告訴我們？"
"story.season.s3_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","沒時間說這個了。跟我來！我們可能已經來不及了。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我感到生命正在流逝......從這個王國......逃離。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","這裡的植物看起來狀況很糟。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","還有那該死的震動。地面都震到要裂開了。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","阿格尼斯。回答我們。馬上。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","你只要知道冰雪巨人之王想讓九大王國解體就夠了。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","讓我們的土地四處漂移，永遠漂到虛無之中，最後一無所有。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","他這樣做將會讓我們的宇宙終結。"
"story.season.s3_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","包括我們自己的世界和家園。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我帶來了消息！"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","說吧，拉塔托斯克。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","那老人要你動作快點！那樹就要死了！"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","「老人」？「樹」？"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","讓我們所有人都在它懷裡休息的那棵樹啊。我在其中建立家園的那棵樹。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我就是順著它的樹幹跑來告訴你：世界樹快死了！"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","世界樹？"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","不確定我聽懂了沒。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","老人指的是眾神之父奧丁。眾神之神。雷神的父親，洛基的繼父。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","九國統治者，在阿斯嘉的寶座之上。從那裡，世界之樹伊格德拉西開始發根。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","將九國結合在一起的根源。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","哦......"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","不過為什麼尤彌爾會想要摧毀他們賴以生存的土地呢？"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","我不懂。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","震動越來越劇烈。其他的之後再說吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","震動！好大！"
"story.season.s3_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","太慢了！你們太慢了！"
"story.season.s3_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","看！我們的四周......"
"story.season.s3_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","植物......樹木......"
"story.season.s3_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","都要死了。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","快點，趁還有時間。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","老姊？"
"story.season.s3_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","來，比約恩。照陌生人說的。"
"story.season.s3_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","趁還有時間。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","哇。那是誰啊？"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","那是冰雪巨人之王尤彌爾嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","對。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","妻子，是這些人嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","對，夫君。一小群悄悄摸進垂死諸國的英雄......"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","......要找你。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我們是來拯救世界之樹的，巨人！"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","而且如果這表示我們必須在你的軍團中努力殺出一條路......"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","就這樣吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","呵呵呵。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","哈哈哈哈！"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","我想要他們的頭，夫君。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","我想要他們的人頭......現在就要！"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","你做了什麼？我夫君呢？！"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你丈夫被打倒了。他的努力都毀了。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","哦，聰明的小蟲子，是嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","還是在你們來之前就完成了？"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","阿格尼斯，快看！那片巨大扭曲的木牆。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","那是世界樹的樹根之一。現在乾枯而焦黑。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","這棵樹失去了一條根，但它的根系很豐富。這顆樹很好，我們拯救了世界！"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","哈哈哈哈哈！"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","我喜歡這個。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","哦，小蟲子。要摧毀宇宙可不只靠一個男人、女人或什麼神。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","我會繼續我夫君的志業......"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","......我們的眾多盟友也會的......"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","她走了。"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","她是要讓宇宙滅亡嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","是。我們的故事提過......"
"story.season.s3_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","那叫做諸神黃昏。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這裡是斯瓦塔爾法海姆。小心點。我們不用在這裡逗留......"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我們只需要穿過去就好。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","那麼我們動作快點吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","這地方......"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","這是阿爾弗里克的王國。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","她是黑暗巫師女王......而我們剛剛殺了她丈夫。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我們被那些黑暗的灌木叢包圍了。這王國簡直是座迷宮。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","或者說是古墓。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","女巫！你不會......"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","安靜！"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","你從我身邊奪走了尤彌爾。現在我也要奪走你的東西。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","我會奪走你的一切。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","阿爾弗里克下定決心要阻礙我們。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","這是她的領土，她的主場......"
"story.season.s3_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","......而她心中充滿悲憤。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們在這裡只有一個目的：穿越過去。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我們必須前往死者之國，也就是冥界。那是赫爾女神的王國。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我雖然比較想看有沒有個派對之神可以晉見，不過看來那裡就只有死亡女神。"
"story.season.s3_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","我們必須查明眾神沉默的原因......"
"story.season.s3_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","所以最好的辦法就是直接找個神問問。走吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","黑暗巫師的國度不總是這麼黑暗嘛。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這是阿爾弗里克愛上冰雪巨人之王以前的狀態。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","他......帶來了壞的影響嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","根據傳說，他們都是善良的......曾經是。不過他們各自的天性毒害了彼此。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","各自扭曲了對方。善良的阿爾弗里克女王於是不復存在。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","然後就是黑暗巫師的崛起。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","而正是她的天性造就了這整個地方的狀態。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","這裡反映了她的內心。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","不，這裡反映的是她的靈魂。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","恐懼將會侵襲你的世界，正適合用來紀念遭到你毒手的王者。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","那就是諸神黃昏！諸神黃昏即將降臨！"
"story.season.s3_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","而所有世界的有的王國都會在其中浮沈......孤獨地......永世浮沈......"
"story.season.s3_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","......而最後，阿斯嘉將會成為它原本變命定要成為的地方。"
"story.season.s3_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","屬於眾神的國度。除此之外再無其他。"
"story.season.s3_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","你們聽見了嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","阿爾弗里克的軍隊正在聚集。"
"story.season.s3_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","他們不就之後就會向我們進攻，全副武裝地傾巢而出。"
"story.season.s3_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","這裡是她的王國，而她為了阻止我們，會願意把它整個給拋入虛空。"
"story.season.s3_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我覺得阿爾弗里克和尤彌爾不是獨自策劃這一切的。"
"story.season.s3_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","注意了，朋友們！"
"story.season.s3_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","敵人來了！"
"story.season.s3_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","上吧，我的子民們！上吧，勇猛的黑暗巫師！"
"story.season.s3_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我必須離開此處，去召集我們的盟友！"
"story.season.s3_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","如果我說錯了，麻煩糾正我一下，但是阿爾弗里克離去的方向跟我們一樣耶。"
"story.season.s3_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","她直接去了......"
"story.season.s3_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","冥界。"
"story.season.s3_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","亡者之后也是阿爾弗里克的盟友嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","只能說希望不要。"
"story.season.s3_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我們盡快行動吧，這樣我們就可以直接去問赫爾。"
"story.season.s3_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們必須搶先阿爾弗里克一步抵達冥府。"
"story.season.s3_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","赫爾與阿爾弗里克同盟這種事未免太扯了。阿爾弗里克可是個混亂的源頭！"
"story.season.s3_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","赫爾不是亡者之后嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","是的，死亡是重生循環的一部分。她可不吃泯滅和混亂這套。"
"story.season.s3_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","泯滅、混亂、死亡......我看是大事不妙了！"
"story.season.s3_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","從此之後......事情可能不像表面上這麼簡單了！"
"story.season.s3_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","阿格尼斯，你說我們得通過尼弗爾海姆才能抵達冥界？"
"story.season.s3_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","是的。尼弗爾海姆是個冰封的王國，薄霧瀰漫，巫術盛行。此地是阿爾弗里克與尤彌爾的第二故鄉。"
"story.season.s3_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你是不是說過，他們正在籌劃諸神黃昏？"
"story.season.s3_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","諸神黃昏......有關的故事就能嚇得我們猶如驚弓之鳥。"
"story.season.s3_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","......要是我們失敗，導致它成為了現實，後果不堪設想。"
"story.season.s3_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","只准成功，不准失敗。我們上！"
"story.season.s3_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","尼弗爾海姆的領袖芬里爾，女皇命你馳援。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","阿爾弗里克......全尼弗爾海姆都與你同悲。國王......"
"story.season.s3_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","你少和我來兔死狐悲這一套，狼王。我要的是你的忠誠和力量。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我獻給你的遠遠超過這些。你心知肚明，阿爾弗里克。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","讓國王淪為手下敗將的敵軍隨後就到。為榮譽而戰吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","他們垮台將帶給我無盡的喜悅。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","隨你便。冥界有要事等著我處理，我隨後就會離開。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我會為你獻上他們的首級。陪伴你踏上漫漫長路。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這場戰鬥順利落幕。入侵者堪稱令人精神為之一振的敵人。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","別想著戲弄他們，狼王。他們可不是軟柿子。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","別害怕。我們快解決他們了。快出發吧。他們這下不敢再找你麻煩了。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","衷心感謝，親愛的野狼。你的國王也會感謝你的。再會。"
"story.season.s3_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","......"
"story.season.s3_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我的心中沒有國王。只有你。"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","敵軍一波波襲來！"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","究竟還有多少敵軍？！"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","不計其數！"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","尼弗爾海姆大軍！重整隊伍！"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","如果我們不突破......"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","......阿爾弗里克便逃之夭夭。"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","可別讓她搶先我們見到赫爾！"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","一不做二不休！"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","奉阿爾弗里克女皇之名！攻擊！"
"story.season.s3_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","讓這群踏上尼弗爾海姆的外來者後悔自己的決定！"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","芬里爾！聽好了！阿爾弗里克要我們顛覆所有人共存的世界！"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你為什麼這麼做？"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你這種凡人永遠也不可能懂。"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","儘管放馬過來。"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","如果要我在宇宙和阿爾弗里克之間抉擇......"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我的選擇永遠是阿爾弗里克。始終如一。"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","你說對了，我不打算跟隨。"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","她現在雖然沒有丈夫。但很快就會成為有夫之婦。"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","我會證明我是尤彌爾也比不上的戰士。"
"story.season.s3_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","讓你成為手下敗將便是。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","此時在冥界......"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","有誰膽敢踏進我的王國一步？"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","請聽我說，亡者之后。你的王國正瀕臨毀滅邊緣。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我是阿爾弗里克，一國之后......"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我知道你的身分，斯瓦塔爾法海姆女王，我一清二楚。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","說吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","世界之樹讓我們的王國團結一致，是讓我們在永無止境虛空混亂中安身立命的力量......"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","說重點。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","她的根，赫爾。世界之樹的根持續遭受攻擊。飽受劇毒之苦。罪魁禍首就是外來者。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","先是約頓海姆。再來是斯瓦塔爾法海姆。如今他們打算對冥界下手。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","......"
"story.season.s3_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","靠近一點。願聞其詳......關於這些外來者。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","外來者......"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","他們朝冥界而來？"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","就在我們談話這當下，尼弗爾海姆正搖搖欲墜。英勇的芬里爾正率兵抵抗。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","嗯。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","在真相大白之前，請你留步，成為我的座上賓。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我的軍團必須出兵協助芬里爾保衛尼弗爾海姆。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","如果你所言不假，那麼我的死亡軍團不消滅這群入侵者，絕不善罷甘休。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","謝謝你，赫爾。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","在此致上十二萬分謝意。"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","有人躲在暗處偷聽......"
"story.season.s3_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","哦。阿爾弗里克是高手。她是謊言與欺騙的頂尖高手......"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","雖然戰鬥並不順利，但如果敗戰是我的命運，我必歡喜相迎......"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","......畢竟實現她的意志是我的使命。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","野狼！你知道我是誰嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","是的......我知道，你是亡者之后！"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","你此行是為了馳援我軍，或是想將我軍據為己有？"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","阿爾弗里克跟我說了諸神黃昏的故事。你知道這個故事嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","諸神黃昏的故事......我知道。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","這個故事無人不知，無人不曉，如果我們功敗垂成，這就是我們的結局。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","這樣的話，我就是你的友軍。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","帶我去找敵人吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","樂意之至。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","同時，阿爾弗里克正在冥界尋找某樣東西......"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","東西呢？這個冷血的巫婆把東西藏到哪去了？到底在哪裡？！"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","洛基還躲在暗處觀察阿爾弗里克......"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","她找的東西會是什麼哪？"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","她為了這樣東西，不惜對亡者之后使出調虎離山之計，讓冥界淪為無主之城......"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","啊......！"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","找到了！"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","這樣東西美得不可方物，遠超乎我的想像。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","哦，那樣東西不該落入阿爾弗里克手上。糟了。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","亡者符石！據說這是赫爾力量的來源。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","她憑借這個符石掌管九大王國的所有亡者。"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","如今卻......"
"story.season.s3_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","......落入了我手上。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","撤退，我的軍團們！我們得重振旗鼓再發動攻勢。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這是怎麼回事？亡者軍團竟然不再聽命於我？！"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","什麼？！亡者軍團居然不聽命於他們的神？"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","各位聽好了。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","洛基。你是否偷走了赫爾對軍隊發號師令的力量？莫非這是你詭計的一部分？"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","嗯，我怎麼敢呢。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","其實我是來告訴你，偷走赫爾發號司令力量的人是誰。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","是阿爾弗里克。她偷走了亡者符石。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","你知道這件事是因為......？"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","或許洛基本來正有此意，但阿爾弗里克卻搶先一步偷走符石？"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","洛基這種微不足道的戲法師，怎麼可能會有那種念頭！"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","這計畫全拜阿爾弗里克至高無上的智慧之賜。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","阿爾弗里克如今成了亡者之后！"
"story.season.s3_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","亡者軍團！快攻擊！奉阿爾弗里克女皇之命！"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","雖然我失勢了......但我將必東山再起......"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","想得美。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","外來者！芬里爾雖然落敗，但亡者軍團依舊聽命於阿爾弗里克！"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","也就是說，九大王國麻煩大了。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","是的，我們明白。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","但還有一件壞消息。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","烈火巨人之王蘇爾特爾。他趁我不在時闖入我的王國。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我感覺得到。他朝冥界的伊格德拉西之根而去......"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","蘇爾特爾已經與阿爾弗里克聯手。如果尤彌爾是惡棍，那麼蘇爾特爾有過之而無不及。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","赫爾女皇，你一向善待我們亡者。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","我們有責任為你取回亡者符石，赫爾女皇。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","我們必須阻止諸神黃昏。也就是說，我們必須去一趟冥界。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","我可以為你開啟冥界之路哈爾芙格。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","你應該能迅速抵達冥府。"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","為了九大王國，務必阻止蘇爾特爾，拯救伊格德拉西之根！"
"story.season.s3_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","快去。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","原來，這就是死者之國。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我還以為有多了不起呢......"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","厄運！"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","沒有......骷髏。我還以為骷髏會滿坑滿谷。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","厄運！"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","拉塔托斯克！發生了什麼事？"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","是女王阿爾弗里克！她的死亡軍團來了！"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","它行動了！它對宿敵採取行動了！"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","亞爾夫海姆巫師！"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","亞爾夫海姆是個藝術之國，祥和的國度。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","這對巫師來說似乎是個大麻煩。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","亞爾夫海姆有多遠？"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","遠在天邊。比烈火巨人之國穆斯貝爾海姆還遠。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","穆斯貝爾海姆這個名字，代表著「烈火的世界盡頭」。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","我們不可能及時馳援穆斯貝爾海姆。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","一名金髮女子向英雄們靠近......"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","洛基，你幫了大忙。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","誰......？"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_18","希弗，你好。希弗，這是大伙。大伙，這是希弗。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_19","我大嫂。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_20","我們是亞爾夫海姆的唯一希望，他們和我們之間隔著死亡王國和烈火王國。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_21","對了，洛基，索爾向你問好。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_22","很好。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","那麼，妹夫，請你說明一下，阿爾弗里克偷走亡者符石的時候，你怎麼出現在赫爾的寢室？"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","純屬......運氣。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","騙子！小偷！"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","純屬運氣！算你走運，幸運的洛基碰巧目睹了一切！你也才能得知阿爾弗里克背叛的事！"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","透露這個消息的人是內奸，不是你，你這個雙面謊言之王。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","「內奸？」"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","就算你因為任務在身去了赫爾的寢室，也是為了一己私利，洛基。你一向如此。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","沒錯！你在那裡是為了要偷走符石！"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","什麼？哎......絕對沒有。畢竟我可是為了你才下的手。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","洛基......"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","好吧，算了。對啦，我去那裡是為了要偷走符石。但是原因和你所想的不同。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","洗耳恭聽。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","繼續說下去。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我兄弟巴德爾不是我殺的。我不該受到逐出家門的懲罰。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","但是只有一個人能證明這件事。"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","巴德爾......"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","你......你去是為了帶回巴德爾？"
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","歐丁不會相信我這個被誤認的「兇手」..."
"story.season.s3_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_18","他倒是會相信被謀殺的那個人！"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","......"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","阿爾弗里克......"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","你的永恆黑暗。這個卑微的僕人怎麼足以討好你？"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","......"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","你給我的......禮物......"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","哦，偉大的吞噬者，我會以迅雷不及掩耳的速度奉上亡者符石。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","......"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","是嗎......"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","哦，幽影，巫師的折磨也是我的禮物。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","我們不能放過這個大好機會。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","......"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","這件事......這件事我有把握。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","燒死巫師。你能幫上忙，我將感激不盡。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","接著便火速飛回來找我。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","用飛的。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","否則......你會比巫師還生不如死。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","......"
"story.season.s3_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","遵、遵命，吞噬滅絕者。在下唯命是從。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","警報！"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","該不會又來了。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","阿爾弗里克！阿爾弗里克打算將亡者符石獻給......！"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","給誰......？"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","給誰......！"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","給誰，拉塔托斯克？"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","她所謂的......吞噬滅絕者。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","生死的力量不該落入小人手中。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","但我們也必須守護冥界的伊格德拉西之根。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","我們不能讓樹根落入烈火巨人之王之手......"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","......在我們親自造訪他的王國之前。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","我丈夫索爾已經率軍前往穆斯貝爾海姆。"
"story.season.s3_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","我們最好能盡快過去那裡和他會合。"
"story.season.s3_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","在那裡！世界之樹，偉大的冥界伊格德拉西之根！而......"
"story.season.s3_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","糟了！樹根正遭受攻擊！"
"story.season.s3_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","哈哈哈。死亡軍團，全力以赴吧。沒錯。切斷樹根。"
"story.season.s3_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我們慢了一步。樹根幾近斷裂。我覺得我和王國的......連結......正在生死邊緣......"
"story.season.s3_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","快武裝！"
"story.season.s3_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","為了世界樹！"
"story.season.s3_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","哦。"
"story.season.s3_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","哈哈哈。看好了，軍團們。稍微活動一下筋骨。"
"story.season.s3_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","戰鬥吧，我的死亡士兵！我們相約在穆斯貝爾海姆會合！"
"story.season.s3_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","他快逃走了！"
"story.season.s3_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","冥界之根！死亡軍團並未徹底切斷樹根。"
"story.season.s3_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","但是烈火巨人之王絕對不會善罷甘休。他依舊握有符石和大軍......"
"story.season.s3_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","那麼我們便起身迎戰。"
"story.season.s3_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","用從他那裡偷走的軍隊......以及其他手段......"
"story.season.s3_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","前往穆斯貝爾海姆！"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","希弗。這是什麼？"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","好，聽著，你們兩個都必須保持冷靜！"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","「兩個都是？」"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","他在哪裡？！"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","索爾。兄弟。你看起來......"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我一點也不好！我怒火中燒！"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我本來想說「真帥氣」。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","你竟斗膽從赫爾身上竊取生死之力？！"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","騙徒！小偷！詐欺！"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","諸神黃昏降臨或許能粉碎你的流亡囚室......"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","...歐丁手下留情，你才擺脫了叛徒的命運..."
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","......但是你必須為了這件暴行再次面對眾神之父。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","最後一次！"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","索爾迅速離去，怒氣未消。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","索爾！快回來！"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","原來，眾神之父歐丁知情？"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","你逃走的事？對。他......下令要你覲見。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","等情勢允許的時候。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_18","那當然。我猜那是上策。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_19","我......應該去找索爾。趁他還沒亂砸我們需要的東西。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_20","當然。多虧你，我才沒被他砸下去。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","赫爾。你還好嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","糾正錯誤之前，我絕不善罷甘休。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","赫爾越來越虛弱。她的元氣與冥界連結，冥界又與受損的樹根密不可分。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","另外，烈火巨人之王蘇爾特爾打算消滅剩下的樹根。而這件事居然也與你有關，我一點都不意外。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","阿格尼斯。我們多快可以趕到蘇爾特爾的要塞？"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","如果我們動作快，歐丁又支持我們，我們或許能在他採取下一步前找到他。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","我們必須拯救九大王國以及阿斯嘉。我們必須鍥而不捨。我們要向他們迎戰！"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","廢話少說。拔刀行動吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","別急。穆斯貝爾海姆的高溫對烈火巨人之王和他的眾神同胞有利......"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","......但是對於我們這種凡人來說卻是熔爐。爐心正是烈火巨人之王的安身之處。"
"story.season.s3_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","規劃他的下一步......"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","雖然阿爾弗里克火速趕往亞爾夫海姆，但我們的眾英雄卻正在穆斯貝爾海姆稍事歇息......"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","洛基，你在冥界鬼鬼祟祟行動時，也打算偷走我的力量嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","嗯，我確實打算借用一下。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","「借用？」"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","算是吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","因為你希望覲見你那遇害的兄弟巴德爾？"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","為什麼不直接向我開口？"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","流亡讓情況變得棘手。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","而我這個人習慣先下手為強。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","「叛徒洛基」。果然人如其名。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","你說你兄弟巴德爾不是你殺的？"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","你還真會編故事。如果是事實，那麼歐丁那段故事可就說錯了。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","俗話說：「我們無法選擇誰當我們家人。」"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","洛基！今天結束了。我們得再找一天賭一把。你要加入我們嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","當然好，前提是要有賭金。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","失禮了，夫人。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","請。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","......"
"story.season.s3_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_18","不公平的流放？或許是吧，叛徒。或許不是。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","......"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我這個人......日理萬機。蘇爾特爾即將行動。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","任何人都拯救不了試圖干涉的人，無論是雷神還是超凡脫俗的英雄都不例外......"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","......"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","呃......我感應到了，有強大的惡魔正在注視我們......"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","薇薇卡？你沒事吧？"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","它知道我們在這裡......"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","糟了。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","「可怕的黑暗。而且聲音如雷貫耳。」拉塔托斯克如此說道。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","想必是引起這場軒然大波的邪惡巨怪！"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","它從遠方看到我們了！"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","以我之名......消除這群英雄的記憶。這群......所謂的眾神。"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","消滅他們，蘇爾特爾！"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","烈火與死亡軍團！出擊！"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","為了穆斯貝爾海姆！為了諸神黃昏！"
"story.season.s3_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","為了吞噬滅絕者尼霍格！"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","呃......"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","赫爾！理查德，快去幫她！"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我......我沒事。我還能戰鬥。我會繼續奮戰。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","死亡將至。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","這件事你比誰都清楚，曾經的亡者之后。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","暗黑！"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","現身吧！"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","索爾。我沒辦法......"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","我在這裡，弱神。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","我在這裡。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","你無法施以重擊的對象。你無法戰鬥的對象。始終獲得最後勝利的對象。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","我要召喚......阿斯嘉。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","嗯......！"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","走了......尼霍格走了。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","不。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","尼霍格恐怕還沒走。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","尼霍格飛越穆斯貝爾海姆，前往八大王國中心那個扭曲的宇宙......"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","好漢......不吃眼前虧。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你們不愧是阿斯嘉的戰士。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","阿斯嘉一塌糊塗。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","雷神與你們同在。我們今天開始扭轉乾坤了！"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","別玩命......"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","警報！警報！"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","該死。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","拉塔托斯克！"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","亞爾夫海姆！亞爾夫海姆！巫師之國遭到圍攻！"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","死亡軍團......我感應到了，他們空洞的雙眼鎖定了那片綠地......"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","阿爾弗里克的死亡軍團......巫師尚未做好迎戰他們的準備。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","巫師們將潰不成軍。我們必須馳援。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","阿格尼斯......比約恩......赫爾越來越虛弱。少了她，亡者符石就沒有合適的主人。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","如果我們打算阻止死亡軍團，就必須養精蓄銳。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","我們必須迅速採取行動，才有機會擊敗烈火巨人之王。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","我們兄弟兩個難得意見一致。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","那麼我們絕不善罷甘休。我們快朝敵人揮兵。不計一切代價。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","同意。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_18","太厲害了......我們兄弟難得意見一致。你們不愧是阿斯嘉的戰士。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_19","快來。我們和烈火巨人之王有約。"
"story.season.s3_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_20","九大王國的第九個王國阿斯嘉，如今現身其他王國中央。"
"story.season.s3_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","嘖嘖嘖。英雄們這麼快又回來了。"
"story.season.s3_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","他們終於看透自身困境的本質了。"
"story.season.s3_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","哈哈哈......"
"story.season.s3_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","但為時已晚。尼霍格已重返九大王國，而阿爾弗里克則正準備焚燒亞爾夫海姆......"
"story.season.s3_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","儘管來吧。上啊，微不足道的英雄們。"
"story.season.s3_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","帶著破釜沉舟的決心受死吧！"
"story.season.s3_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","阿爾弗里克......"
"story.season.s3_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","領主。"
"story.season.s3_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","烈火巨人之王......陣亡了。"
"story.season.s3_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","你......感應到了？"
"story.season.s3_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我感應到了，我的領主。"
"story.season.s3_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我相信......他並沒有白白送死......"
"story.season.s3_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","沒有，我的領主。他幫我們爭取到寶貴的時間。"
"story.season.s3_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","亞爾夫海姆即將陷入火海。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","亞爾夫海姆陷入火海了！武器，快給我一把武器。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","希弗，別讓這個惡棍拿走魔法武器。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","希弗，給洛基一把劍。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","善良的赫爾女皇，這隻臭蛤蟆殺了我的兄弟巴德爾。他將......"
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","雷神，已故的巴德爾現在和我共同居住在死者之國。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我現在就告訴你："
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","讓洛基取得金劍。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","關於這件事，我相信赫爾。劍給你吧，洛基。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","一起拯救亞爾夫海姆。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","妳拯救了亞爾夫海姆。我打算用這把劍指向斯瓦塔爾法海姆的某位女王。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","你打得不錯，戲耍小子。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","還不夠好。阿爾弗里克逃走了。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","阿爾弗里克沒有逃跑。她就在附近。我可以聞得到她的氣味。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","阿爾弗里克還沒有完全毀掉這座曾經一片祥和的王國。"
"story.season.s3_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","讓我來先替大家看守。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","阿爾弗里克突然現身在英雄們面前！"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這裡所有英雄都要來抓我......真是感動！"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","女巫！"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","說吧，阿爾弗里克。把你的話說完就滾吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","你同父異母的兄弟巴德爾比你聰明，戲耍小子。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","巴德爾聽說了尼霍格的事，沒錯。然後......尼霍格殺了巴德爾。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","而你的家人卻將這名同父異母的兄弟的死怪罪於你，可憐的洛基。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","哈哈哈......"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","阿爾弗里克一邊大笑，一邊像剛剛突然出現那樣迅速消失了。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","嗯，洛基......"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","赫爾知道真相，因為巴德爾現在就和她居住在冥府。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","她什麼也沒說。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","既然阿爾弗里克可以像那樣突然現身，表示她應該離我們很近吧？"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","阿爾弗里克的確就在附近。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","很好。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","你應該明白吧，洛基？"
"story.season.s3_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","妳在問我是否明白為什麼妳明明可以彌補我和家人之間的裂痕，卻選擇隻字不提？"
"story.season.s3_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","即使這能夠讓我父親奧丁的眼睛痊癒？我絕對明白。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","如果不尊重生死的界線，生命就失去了價值。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","宇宙也會失去價值。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","即使是奧丁也必須尊重。"
"story.season.s3_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","妳畢竟是尊貴的女王，喔，亡者之后才對。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我擔心阿爾弗里克很快就會將尼霍格最想要的東西獻給他......亡者符石。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","也就是說......尼霍格會成為亡者領主。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","生死的界線將會隨即崩塌。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","渾沌。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","亡者將復活，而生者將死去。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","警報！"
"story.season.s3_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你也太遲了吧，拉塔托斯克。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","他們復生了！他們復生了！"
"story.season.s3_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","亞爾夫海姆的亡者！他們復生了！"
"story.season.s3_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","大......大家都還好嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","阿爾弗里克對我們來說太強大了......"
"story.season.s3_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","......她的力量越來越強。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","因此導致生死界線變得薄弱。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","就連世界樹也枯萎而亡了。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我必須要得到符石。沒有它我無法讓亡者安息。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","這只是尼霍格宏偉目標的開胃菜罷了。"
"story.season.s3_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我們必須阻止阿爾弗里克。亡者符石絕對不能交給尼霍格。"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","那就是阿爾弗里克的營地。那裡肯定有幾名密探。"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我會用我強大的雷神之鎚擊碎他們的軍隊！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","或者......"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","......我們悄悄潛入，趁她還沒發現的時候就奪走符石。"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","除非她已經知道我們在這兒。"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","她怎麼可能會......？"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","此時的阿爾弗里克營地......"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","僕從......"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","符石......"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","我正等著妳的禮物......"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我這就火速到你面前，噢！絕望粉碎者啊，噢！漆黑的黑夜之王啊。符石終將歸你所有！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","英雄們知道現在已經太遲了！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","戰友們！你們和我一樣都聽見了嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","阿爾弗里克向西方和東方發出了警報。快看！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","我們左右都被包圍了。"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","但阿爾弗里克在哪裡？又被她逃掉了嗎？"
"story.season.s3_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","拿出武器！我們一定得抓到她！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","符石！符石在哪？！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","阿爾弗里克......妳擋不住我的敵人......"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我的王啊......噢！吞噬滅絕之王......"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","但妳成功了......妳將我渴望的東西帶來給我......"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","現在亡者符石是我的了！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","不！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","太遲了。我們太遲了。"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","現在......我望向阿斯嘉。"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","阿斯嘉將感受到我的憤怒！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","尼霍格！"
"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","他已經勢不可擋了。"
