"story.season.s3_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","他要去摧毀阿斯嘉。"
"story.season.s3_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","看那邊！巨樹旁邊有座宏偉的城市。是阿斯嘉！"
"story.season.s3_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","啊嗚嗚！"
"story.season.s3_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","尼霍格捎來問候，亡者之后......"
"story.season.s3_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","......祝你歸鄉的旅途飛快又苦痛！"
"story.season.s3_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","墮落之狼並不孤單！撐住！"
"story.season.s3_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","芬里爾......徹底受到重挫，再一次失敗。"
"story.season.s3_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","多虧尼霍格，他重拾自己的力量。"
"story.season.s3_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","這不對勁，唯有神能讓神死而復生。"
"story.season.s3_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","死者之廳堂......極為龐大，而且擠滿了人。"
"story.season.s3_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","越來越接近阿斯嘉的高牆。"
"story.season.s3_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我們走吧。"
"story.season.s3_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","阿斯嘉和世界樹！全都遭到圍攻了！"
"story.season.s3_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","阿斯嘉就快到了。歐丁在哪裡？"
"story.season.s3_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我想應該是在防衛女武神大殿。那裡就位於阿斯嘉中央位置。"
"story.season.s3_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","尼霍格在召喚另一位殞落之神前來支援。"
"story.season.s3_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","是烈火巨人之王。從冥界廳堂受到召喚......"
"story.season.s3_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","是的，還有小兵跟隨我。"
"story.season.s3_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","穆斯貝爾海姆已經陷入火海！我完了，又完了......"
"story.season.s3_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","真是受夠了那個莽夫！我們繼續前進！"
"story.season.s3_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","不知道尼霍格還準備了哪些詭計等著我們......"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","溫度突然驟降了。也太冷了。"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","即使從陰間歸來，我們也要前來相助，尼霍格。"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","冰雪巨人之王！你將與你的兄弟一般，再度殞落！"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","慢著。「我們？」尤彌爾有同夥......？"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","是啊，多管閒事之徒。我要與我的丈夫並肩作戰！"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","歐丁的鬍鬚！同時跟兩個神戰鬥簡直就是惡夢！"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","大家聽好：繼續纏住他們，我有個主意。"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","怎麼......？"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","相信我。"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","你們別想阻撓偉大尼霍格的計畫！"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我們信賴你，尼霍格，這份信任支撐著我們！尤彌爾，我的愛人......讓我們......"
"story.season.s3_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","......毀滅他們！"
"story.season.s3_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","阿爾弗里克和尤彌爾阻止不了我們......他們的怒意和憤怒雖然十分駭人，但我們獲勝了。"
"story.season.s3_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","死者之國冥府正在呼喚他們回去。"
"story.season.s3_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","瓦爾哈拉就在前頭！尼霍格想必已在那邊等著我們。"
"story.season.s3_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","你們務必引開尼霍格，擊退他的部隊！"
"story.season.s3_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","只要讓我悄悄溜過這片戰場，就能拿到我們此刻最需要的東西......"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","在其他人注意到洛基消失之前，他已經回來了。

戲法師看起來仍然提心吊膽。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","世界之樹即將死亡。九大王國正分崩離析。難道這個世界已經沒救了嗎......？"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","放心。我，眾神之父歐丁，將挽回尼霍格所下的毒手！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","哦，歐丁，眾神之神！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","歐丁，父親。要想修復尼霍格造成的破壞，你需要亡者符石。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","說到那顆符石呀，我戲法師洛基才剛偷到手！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我任性的孩子啊......做得好。偉大的吞噬者尼霍格，他的計畫就要泡湯了！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","以此符石之名，我召喚世界之樹。九大王國的聯繫者呀，我召喚你。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","憑我......憑藉符石之力......"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","......消解劇毒。再度復甦。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","歐丁召喚著符石的力量，一道燦爛的光線點亮天空。

在歐丁手中，亡者符石也成為了生之符石。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","快看那顆樹，它恢復成以前強壯又翠綠的模樣了！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","呃啊......這可不行啊！不能這樣！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","要是劇毒失效......要是奸計詭詐徒勞無功......"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","......那唯一剩下的辦法就是：燒毀一切！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","尼霍格召喚凡人無法理解的可怕力量。

隨著尼霍格力量增強，召喚的低吼聲再度在死者的廳堂內迴盪！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我的鬍子啊！那個轟隆聲，響遍了九大王國！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你已證明自己配得上瓦爾哈拉！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我很高興在我們對抗邪惡的巨龍時幫得上忙！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","看見壯麗的世界樹恢復生機，感覺真是太好了。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","世界樹活了下來。尼霍格不見蹤影，大地重拾秩序。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","但我們......我們也該回歸自己的世界囉。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","遊蕩者們呀，阿斯嘉心中長存感激。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我們會在這裡保護九大王國。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","國度將在這裡......"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","......等你們歸來。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","九大王國在明君手中！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","我們知道這場冒險的結束將是下一場冒險的開始！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","我們已對新的歷險躍躍欲試。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我們樂意伸出援手。"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","新歷險就在前方！我們就等你呼喚一聲！"
"story.season.s3_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","再會了，朋友們。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","歡迎你。我是菲利亞斯·佛格。我的朋友萬事通對你的評價很高。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我名叫奧達，是菲利亞斯的妻子，也是他在這段奇幻之旅中的同伴。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","容我為你引見，這是廣受敬重的科學家莫羅博士。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","佛格，你的確找到了非常不可思議的......品種。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","這位是莫羅的前助理伊麗莎白。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","幸會。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","但我們得先找到船長才行，他同時也是我們的嚮導。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","他動身去探查入口也有好一陣子了，至今尚未返回。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","既然如此，我們還是去找他吧。請帶路。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","菲利亞斯！瞧那邊！"
"story.season.s4_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","唉呀，是船長的三角帽，絕不會是他故意丟在這裡的。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","朋友們，是船長發現了地底荒野的入口，也是他跟那邊的許多居民結識為友......"
"story.season.s4_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","一想到要跟他們碰面......我就......戰戰兢兢。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","而船長學會了他們的語言和習慣。沒有他在，只怕我們的探險還沒開始就得畫上句號。"
"story.season.s4_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","佛格先生！他一定是從這邊被帶走的，我發現好多痕跡！"
"story.season.s4_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","你果然觀察入微，萬事通！繼續前進！"
"story.season.s4_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","莫羅啊，我真等不及想趕緊了解這裡的一切......"
"story.season.s4_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","佛格先生，這位船長究竟是何方神聖？你似乎非常看重他。"
"story.season.s4_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","他是一個有特殊怪癖的好人。"
"story.season.s4_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","菲利亞斯很擅於交際，船長則......挺古怪。"
"story.season.s4_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","而且船長有說不完的故事。"
"story.season.s4_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","起初我感覺那些故事只是幻想，但這個通往另一個世界的入口如此真實，卻不容置疑。"
"story.season.s4_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","佛格先生，這會是一場了不得的歷險！原來，我們的腳底還有一個世界！"
"story.season.s4_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","而這些地底生物必須跟一個天生的惡徒搏鬥。真是精彩......"
"story.season.s4_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","或許有其用處，也說不定？"
"story.season.s4_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","當心！"
"story.season.s4_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","哈囉！啊，你們帶上了我的帽子，太好了。"
"story.season.s4_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","尼莫，是你？！"
"story.season.s4_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","佛格，你們來得正是時候，我剛好趁著在這一趟路上，跟當地人協商呢。"
"story.season.s4_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","就是進入地底荒野的路，懂了嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","沒錯，說得好，萬事通。不過......這一趟旅途恐怕不會太順利。"
"story.season.s4_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","尼莫，你說過，「不會是一趟順利的旅程」。"
"story.season.s4_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","你跟當地人的談判進行得不順利嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我應該能夠回答這個問題。"
"story.season.s4_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","理查德指向暗處，那裡有一堆閃著敵意的眼光。"
"story.season.s4_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","抓住他們！"
"story.season.s4_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我們頗有進展。"
"story.season.s4_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","這些鐘乳石，好壯觀啊，一定經過了很長的歲月才長成今天的模樣！"
"story.season.s4_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","氣味越來越濃......就算在這裡，我都能聞到原始叢林的氣息！"
"story.season.s4_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","在我們有希望見到叢林之前，親愛的奧達，我們得先通過兩地交界的這些洞穴。"
"story.season.s4_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","事不宜遲，快行動吧。"
"story.season.s4_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我們已踏出前往另一個世界的第一步，朋友們！"
"story.season.s4_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","慢著，朋友們！我們即將到達埃洛伊人的地盤，這是個仁慈和善的種族。"
"story.season.s4_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","尼莫？"
"story.season.s4_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","是我沒錯，好友們！我又回來了！"
"story.season.s4_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","受死吧！！！"
"story.season.s4_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我......聽我說......那全......都是誤會！"
"story.season.s4_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","「死」這個字眼表達得還挺直接。"
"story.season.s4_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","他們該不會還對那場「意外」耿耿於懷吧。"
"story.season.s4_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","尼莫，你做了什麼？"
"story.season.s4_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","唉呀，他們又出手攻擊了，太好啦。"
"story.season.s4_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","儘管達埃洛伊人天性溫和，但也會有被招惹的時候。"
"story.season.s4_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","請往下說。"
"story.season.s4_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","經過多次歷險，達埃洛伊人頒贈我......尊榮的禮物。賦予我權利的偉大象徵，那是一組排笛。"
"story.season.s4_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","後來呢......？"
"story.season.s4_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","達埃洛伊人跟邪惡的莫洛克人是長久的世仇，我曾努力為雙方謀和......"
"story.season.s4_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我甚至想把排笛送給莫洛克人，以表誠意。"
"story.season.s4_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","達埃洛伊人再度攻來了！場面太壯觀了！"
"story.season.s4_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","這種韌性值得欽佩。"
"story.season.s4_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","你把排笛給了莫洛克人，現在他們橫掃了達埃洛伊人的領地。"
"story.season.s4_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","其實排笛是被他們搶走的，我說的是真話，我逃出來的時候只剩下帽子。"
"story.season.s4_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","所以......那排笛產生的不只音樂......"
"story.season.s4_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","有意思。"
"story.season.s4_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","親愛的，真的很有意思。"
"story.season.s4_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我可以挽回局面。我完全無意讓地底荒野的國度遭受危險。"
"story.season.s4_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我們必須把排笛從莫洛克人的首領手中奪回。"
"story.season.s4_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","尼莫，想也知道衝突的兩邊都不會信任你。"
"story.season.s4_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","佛格，天意會給我們扭轉局勢的機會，我非常有把握。"
"story.season.s4_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","佛格先生！奧達女士！那些動物在攻擊達埃洛伊人的營地！"
"story.season.s4_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","瞧，佛格！機會來了！"
"story.season.s4_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","是啊，我看若我們在此危機之時幫助達埃洛伊人，也許他們願意給你機會洗刷惡名。"
"story.season.s4_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","要武裝起來嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","武裝起來。"
"story.season.s4_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","伊麗莎白，妳有看出那些動物的行為模式嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","有的，協調一致、有策略，幾乎如同......"
"story.season.s4_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","......受到更高智慧的操縱。"
"story.season.s4_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","達埃洛伊人！在你們恰好需要的時刻，偉大的冒險家尼莫回到你們身邊了！請不要過度歡聲雷動，我的聽覺很敏感。"
"story.season.s4_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","尼莫，你辦到了！翡翠排笛讓那些動物陷入了瘋狂！"
"story.season.s4_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","莫羅，在我眼中不像是瘋狂......"
"story.season.s4_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","他們好像真的在撤退，以便從兩邊包抄我們。"
"story.season.s4_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","他們又來了！我們遭到了攻擊！"
"story.season.s4_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","不好意思，達埃洛伊人提到了「翡翠排笛」是嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","沒錯！尼莫這個叛徒把排笛給了我們的敵人！排笛的聲音使那些動物跟我們作對！"
"story.season.s4_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","那排笛，是否會發出尖銳的高音？"
"story.season.s4_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","對，就是那組排笛。你該不會是首腦吧？"
"story.season.s4_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","注意！你們聽見了嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","音樂？高亢尖銳？"
"story.season.s4_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","是排笛！莫洛克人首領又發動攻擊了！"
"story.season.s4_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","佛格，我們跟著那美妙的音樂行動吧？"
"story.season.s4_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","的確，跟著音樂追尋一定能找到排笛。"
"story.season.s4_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","那就能解除尼莫的困境，最後得到和平。"
"story.season.s4_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","是，和平，當然。"
"story.season.s4_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","哦，莫羅......真是兩全其美的策略。"
"story.season.s4_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","排笛似乎對敵人有催眠作用。"
"story.season.s4_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","那還只是小事，如果那真是翡翠排笛......"
"story.season.s4_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","......就不只是能催眠生靈，還能重組生命。"
"story.season.s4_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","想想這些可能性。"
"story.season.s4_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","就像你一樣。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","看上方的洞穴，那邊的光線越來越亮。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","聽那音樂。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","哇......真是悅耳！"
"story.season.s4_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","掩住耳朵，不要聽那音樂！"
"story.season.s4_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我感覺四周的坑道有動靜......"
"story.season.s4_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我們接近莫洛克人了，必須進入他們的堡壘才行。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","尼莫！"
"story.season.s4_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","天哪，他們記得我。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","去死吧！"
"story.season.s4_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","成功！我們已攻入陰風要塞。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","莫洛克人......他們讓這裡的環境改善了不少。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","當初我看到的莫洛克人只不過是個好戰的部族，如今......！"
"story.season.s4_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","更有組織，更先進。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","是排笛，尼莫，是翡翠排笛的功勞。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","是的。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","你說的對。"
"story.season.s4_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","這一點，我們暫且不提吧。"
"story.season.s4_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","尼莫，這些莫洛克人比你當初形容的還要可怕太多。"
"story.season.s4_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我們能進到他們的領地如此之深，真是奇怪。"
"story.season.s4_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們能走到這地步是因為他們讓我們這麼做。難道你沒感覺到嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我感覺被人監視了。"
"story.season.s4_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","這種感覺真不好受。"
"story.season.s4_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","快！放陷阱！"
"story.season.s4_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","大家都沒事吧？"
"story.season.s4_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我......應該沒事！"
"story.season.s4_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我的天！莫羅！伊麗莎白小姐！他們不見了！"
"story.season.s4_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","尼莫！我們快去救他們！"
"story.season.s4_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","救他們？從大批莫洛克人手中嗎？佛格，你沒看到他們有多少人嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","菲利亞斯，我們會把他們找回來的。追尋他們的蹤跡應該很容易。"
"story.season.s4_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","你看，莫洛克人似乎把莫羅和伊麗莎白帶到類似市中心廣場的地方。"
"story.season.s4_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","莫羅好像在......跟對方的領導人說話。"
"story.season.s4_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","是。他吸引了酋長的注意。"
"story.season.s4_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","那我們趕緊出擊，趁他們專注在其他地方的時候！"
"story.season.s4_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","伊麗莎白是在......微笑嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","莫羅！伊麗莎白！快跑！趁莫洛克人重新集結！"
"story.season.s4_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你們......是來救我們的嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","太貼心了！"
"story.season.s4_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","不好意思？"
"story.season.s4_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","喔，佛格，我們不會跟你走的。"
"story.season.s4_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我們已到達目的地，在這裡跟新朋友在一起，相當、相當的快樂。"
"story.season.s4_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","排笛也很大方地信任我。"
"story.season.s4_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","莫羅把翡翠排笛舉到嘴邊，吹奏了起來。"
"story.season.s4_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","叛徒！"
"story.season.s4_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","莫羅在吹奏翡翠排笛，莫洛克人顯然大為振奮！"
"story.season.s4_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我們快逃吧！"
"story.season.s4_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","彼此挨著！不要有任何人脫隊！"
"story.season.s4_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我們走！"
"story.season.s4_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","佛格、奧達，還有巴斯圖。我向你們致歉。都是我......太傲慢......才害大家來到這裡。"
"story.season.s4_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","當然，這是一場困境。"
"story.season.s4_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","達埃洛伊人是善良的一族。他們誤信了我。我一定要挽回鑄成的傷害。"
"story.season.s4_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們必須奪回翡翠排笛。"
"story.season.s4_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","不知道怎麼樣能夠辦到呢？"
"story.season.s4_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","跟著音樂走。"
"story.season.s4_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","達埃洛伊人倚賴這裡的水晶，得到神奇能量。"
"story.season.s4_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","莫洛克人卻佔領了此地。"
"story.season.s4_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們的使命非常明確。"
"story.season.s4_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我們往水晶洞穴更深的地方去！"
"story.season.s4_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","看，達埃洛伊人在採水晶。"
"story.season.s4_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","尼莫。"
"story.season.s4_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","啊，我的好友，哈囉。"
"story.season.s4_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","好達埃洛伊，我們解放了洞穴的小部分區域。你的人民暫且可以安心。"
"story.season.s4_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","你們放心，我們沒有奪回你們的水晶田是不會罷休的......也包括排笛。"
"story.season.s4_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","事情沒有那麼簡單。排笛......讓事情變得不同。請多加戒備。"
"story.season.s4_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我好像已抓到吹奏這支排笛的訣竅。"
"story.season.s4_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","佛格一行人決心要討回這一切，莫羅。"
"story.season.s4_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","沒錯，他們已把莫洛克人趕走......"
"story.season.s4_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","......不過，我們等著看，野生動物受到排笛影響之後，他們能怎麼應付。"
"story.season.s4_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","莫羅吹奏著翡翠排笛。伊麗莎白眼睛一亮，既吃驚又喜悅。"
"story.season.s4_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","莫羅，你真行！"
"story.season.s4_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","排笛使動物群變得好可怕。"
"story.season.s4_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","再一次！再一次！"
"story.season.s4_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","有何不可？"
"story.season.s4_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","莫羅邪惡的樂聲使這個地方變得腐敗！"
"story.season.s4_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","第二波！武裝起來！"
"story.season.s4_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","他們在撤退！"
"story.season.s4_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","好不容易得到勝利。"
"story.season.s4_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我不知道，感覺好像不太對勁......"
"story.season.s4_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","深環礁湖傳出了聲音。情況不妙。"
"story.season.s4_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","莫洛克人......"
"story.season.s4_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","......還有音樂。"
"story.season.s4_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","莫羅博士吹奏了翡翠排笛，腐化了莫洛克人的心智。"
"story.season.s4_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","戰地測試完成。主要活動即將開始。"
"story.season.s4_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","真是刺激啊，親愛的。"
"story.season.s4_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","莫洛克人！該你們上場了！冒險家們變弱了！"
"story.season.s4_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","而那樂聲讓我們變得更強大！"
"story.season.s4_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","那個叛徒莫羅在監視我們！"
"story.season.s4_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","他正在評估我們他的突變大軍的反應。"
"story.season.s4_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","莫羅......是很享受這一切嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","他顯然想要把這種力量完全據為己有。"
"story.season.s4_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","莫羅愈來愈能掌握那排笛的魔法了。"
"story.season.s4_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","而且正在把那力量化為己用。"
"story.season.s4_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們得開始調查他的能力。"
"story.season.s4_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","地上人！莫洛克人要來對付你們了！"
"story.season.s4_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我們得撤退！他們人數太多了！"
"story.season.s4_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","而且他們肯定不會跟我們講道理。"
"story.season.s4_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","這都是我的錯。都是因為我的關係，莫羅才會拿到那個排笛。"
"story.season.s4_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們回營地去！"
"story.season.s4_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我不能撤退。我必須彌補我自己犯的錯誤。我有個計畫。"
"story.season.s4_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","是什麼呢？"
"story.season.s4_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","找出塊頭最大的莫洛克人，然後把他打趴。"
"story.season.s4_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","那就是你的計畫啊？"
"story.season.s4_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","莫洛克人的天性是追隨最強壯的領袖。他們的首領知道我們需要的情報。"
"story.season.s4_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","如果拿下首領，或許我們可以得到一些有用的消息。"
"story.season.s4_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","這還不算太壞。"
"story.season.s4_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","根本荒謬！"
"story.season.s4_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","就是說啊！你在想什麼啊？"
"story.season.s4_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","他們的數目是我們的十倍啊。真瘋狂，尼莫。"
"story.season.s4_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","但這有用。"
"story.season.s4_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","呃......你們......你們想知道什麼？"
"story.season.s4_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","讓我們的莫洛克朋友從翡翠排笛的影響之下解放吧。讓他......恢復本色。"
"story.season.s4_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","排笛......改變了我們莫拉克人。改變了我。不是好事。"
"story.season.s4_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","高貴的莫洛克人，請告訴我莫羅的計畫。"
"story.season.s4_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","翡翠排笛是生命。也是死亡。"
"story.season.s4_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","來吧，我來告訴你們。"
"story.season.s4_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","嘿，為什麼你要帶我們到這個被淹沒的洞穴來呢？"
"story.season.s4_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我也並不是完全了解，但是在這裡的洞穴中......有人知道。"
"story.season.s4_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","看那裡！地面在動！"
"story.season.s4_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","地面在躍動。"
"story.season.s4_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","你們好！各位是第一次到這裡吧？我叫莫理斯。"
"story.season.s4_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","呃......嗨，莫理斯。"
"story.season.s4_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我挖隧道。我在這裡到處走動。四處穿梭。在所有人腳底下。"
"story.season.s4_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","有時候我會聽到別人講話。我的隧道距離所有地方都只隔一層薄薄的地面，你們知道的。"
"story.season.s4_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我有聽見你們的朋友講話。他叫莫羅，對吧？有翡翠排笛那個？嗯。"
"story.season.s4_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","他想吹鎮魂曲，對。"
"story.season.s4_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","別讓他如願。你們不會希望他成功的。"
"story.season.s4_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","「吹奏鎮魂曲」，那是什麼？"
"story.season.s4_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","竊取了莫絡克人心智的黑暗樂曲。"
"story.season.s4_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","如果我聽見的事情是真的，那現在這樣只是暖身啦。"
"story.season.s4_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","莫羅現在吹的不過就是其中一小段。真正的鎮魂曲......"
"story.season.s4_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","是獻給所有生靈的輓歌。"
"story.season.s4_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我的天哪。"
"story.season.s4_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","你確定嗎，莫理斯先生？莫羅想吹這首「輓歌」？"
"story.season.s4_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","對，我的隧道可是四通八達，你們知道的。"
"story.season.s4_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","不過他確實提到了很多次「神一般的」。"
"story.season.s4_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","壞人用這個詞的時候，從來不會有好事。"
"story.season.s4_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","莫理斯，如果我們想阻止莫羅吹出這首......鎮魂曲......"
"story.season.s4_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們該怎麼做？"
"story.season.s4_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","不知道。不過芝諾比亞女王應該知道。"
"story.season.s4_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","她的心靈是她所有手下心靈的集合。每一隻工蜂和雄蜂。"
"story.season.s4_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","帶我們去找她。"
"story.season.s4_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","你以為我在幹嘛？我們就快到了！"
"story.season.s4_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","哦，你終究成功了。"
"story.season.s4_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","殿下，你親臨是我們的榮幸！"
"story.season.s4_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","那......那個聲音不像女王。"
"story.season.s4_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","以我們兩個人來說，你的反應一向比較遲緩，菲利亞斯。"
"story.season.s4_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","......莫羅？"
"story.season.s4_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","你這個不速之客，菲利亞斯。關於那件事......"
"story.season.s4_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","......我們意見完全一致。"
"story.season.s4_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","怎麼......莫羅怎麼會是......昆蟲？"
"story.season.s4_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","他不是。都是該死的排笛害的。莫理斯說，女王的想法就是她臣民的想法。"
"story.season.s4_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","莫羅的排笛偷走了女王的心。他透過她發言、透過她思考......"
"story.season.s4_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","......原來莫羅就是女王。也是她的所有臣民。"
"story.season.s4_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","真是鬆了一口氣吧？好險。"
"story.season.s4_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","不好意思？"
"story.season.s4_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","嗯......如果女王的想法就是蜂群的想法......你只要解除下在女王身上的咒語就行了，對吧？"
"story.season.s4_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","釋放女王，釋放當地的每隻昆蟲。"
"story.season.s4_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","但是，當然！"
"story.season.s4_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","嗯，顯然這份工作非你莫屬了。"
"story.season.s4_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","不過，先喝杯茶再說，我得思考一下。"
"story.season.s4_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","那是她的大法庭，就在那裡。你們真的要對抗她嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們非這麼做不可。"
"story.season.s4_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我相信打斷女王的......意識，應該能解除莫羅的咒語。"
"story.season.s4_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們得將她擊暈。"
"story.season.s4_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","如果我們沒猜錯，那招應該也會擊暈所有昆蟲。"
"story.season.s4_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","讓莫羅孤立無援。"
"story.season.s4_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","沒錯。這個嘛。我最好找個視野好的地方。這一定很有看頭！"
"story.season.s4_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","讓我猜猜。你以為把我擊暈就能解決所有事。"
"story.season.s4_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","該死！他是怎麼知道的？"
"story.season.s4_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們的確是如此，莫羅。"
"story.season.s4_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","那招行不通。"
"story.season.s4_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","為什麼不行，說來聽聽？"
"story.season.s4_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","因為你不可能有機會。"
"story.season.s4_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","快看！昆蟲！牠們全都睡著了！"
"story.season.s4_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","莫洛克酋長醒了之後就恢復了。我們必須相信，女王陛下一醒過來就能恢復神智。"
"story.season.s4_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","然後呢？"
"story.season.s4_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","答案。讓我們抱持希望。"
"story.season.s4_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們聽過鎮魂曲了，溫血動物。"
"story.season.s4_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","你擺脫莫羅的靡靡之音了，殿下。"
"story.season.s4_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","鎮魂曲不是旋律，溫血動物。"
"story.season.s4_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","它是一種聲音。它會說所有語言。"
"story.season.s4_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","它用裂縫章魚的語言誓言復仇。你最好別張揚。"
"story.season.s4_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","為了尤塞娜......"
"story.season.s4_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我還以為我們已經擺脫和這群烏賊的不和了！"
"story.season.s4_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","顯然還沒。"
"story.season.s4_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","鎮魂曲力量強大。觸角無遠弗屆。"
"story.season.s4_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","它只需要一個代理人、一個先知，成為其意志的通道。"
"story.season.s4_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","莫羅。"
"story.season.s4_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","你污辱了我的人民，辜負了我們的尤塞娜女王。"
"story.season.s4_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","八爪族不再弱小。"
"story.season.s4_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們必須復仇。復仇......並重生！"
"story.season.s4_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","準備再輸一次吧，魷魚王。"
"story.season.s4_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你最好相信這一回。"
"story.season.s4_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你認識這個......人嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們知道他的女王是誰，是我們很久以前驅逐的邪惡人物。"
"story.season.s4_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","而她將會重返榮耀！"
"story.season.s4_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","噢，無盡黑暗之力！噢，荒野深淵之王！"
"story.season.s4_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我伊諾甫，尤塞娜女王最信任的侍從，向你乞求！"
"story.season.s4_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我長途跋涉，抵達這個古怪之地，就為了找到你！我唱頌你的歌曲！也獻上豐盛的祭品！"
"story.season.s4_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","現在我必須誠懇請求：回來吧，尤塞娜女王！重返榮耀吧！"
"story.season.s4_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我在此請求使用你唯一的真名！我在此請求，呼喚此名......造物主！"
"story.season.s4_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","嗯？噢不，我不這麼認為。"
"story.season.s4_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","怎麼可能，我一再尋找、一再研究，我獻上祭品、唱著最晦澀的歌曲......"
"story.season.s4_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","尤塞娜女王，我辜負了你。"
"story.season.s4_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","「造物主」，你剛剛說了這個名字，是什麼意思？"
"story.season.s4_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","造物主......"
"story.season.s4_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","輓歌。"
"story.season.s4_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","輓歌不是一種歌。"
"story.season.s4_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","是神。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","翡翠排笛屬於偉大的國王魯海德，莫洛克人......卻把它偷走了。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","偉大的國王從此魂不守舍。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","魯海德？為什麼你從來沒提過這個「偉大的國王」？"
"story.season.s4_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","魯海德是整個地底荒野的國王，是我們的......守護者。我們沒有成功奪回排笛......"
"story.season.s4_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","......於是偉大的國王便失了魂，他所有的力量都灌注在排笛上，為了我們這些子民。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我們不敢再提起他的名號，這實在是我們的莫大恥辱。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","多告訴我一點關於這位魯海德的事。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們稱他為「智慧之父」，他打造出排笛來保護我們的安危。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","偉大的國王用歌唱軀走了無盡的黑暗，否則我們都會淪為獵物。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我覺得要平息這場災難，得先把排笛還給國王。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","伊麗莎白從遠處監視這群人。"
"story.season.s4_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","好機會，親愛的。"
"story.season.s4_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","莫羅，親愛的，快點！"
"story.season.s4_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這些農民真是......毫不留情。"
"story.season.s4_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","當然，心愛的，可以再拖住他們一下嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","莫羅正在演奏翡翠排笛，希望能利用魯海德國王對付冒險家。"
"story.season.s4_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","這可悲的國王鬼魂真讓我火大。"
"story.season.s4_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","莫羅！我撐不住了......！"
"story.season.s4_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","親愛的伊麗莎白，我愛上的可是那個強大又無情的女人。"
"story.season.s4_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","現在我需要她，擋住他們。再撐一下，我就可以讓這個可悲的老國王唱出我們要的曲調。"
"story.season.s4_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","全世界最強大的旋律......把全世界都唱給我們。"
"story.season.s4_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","莫羅，我愛你。"
"story.season.s4_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我知道。"
"story.season.s4_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","你......真是不會選敵人。"
"story.season.s4_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","現在你面對的是伊麗莎白......但不用多久......"
"story.season.s4_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","......我和我的愛人將會更強大。"
"story.season.s4_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","伊麗莎白，你知道嗎，早在我的時代，這些說詞我就已經聽多了"
"story.season.s4_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","說這些的沒一個有好下場。"
"story.season.s4_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","沒錯......魯海德曾經用歌唱擊退了造物主......用的就是美妙的翡翠排笛。"
"story.season.s4_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","但現在莫羅拿到了排笛......等於是擁有了魯海德。"
"story.season.s4_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","莫羅有排笛就能控制偉大的國王......在莫羅的指令之下......"
"story.season.s4_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","魯海德......將會用歌唱喚回無盡黑暗。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","如果伊麗莎白說的是真的，我們應該要先讓魯海德國王重獲自由。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這可不是小事啊，佛格先生。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","回頭，或是毀滅。出聲吧，魯海德國王。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","非常好，真是聽話。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我的老天。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","莫羅的力量顯然變強了。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","哈，完全超出你的想像。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","但是我們得和國王談談，要讓他恢復理智。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我想要我要代表地底荒野所有居民向你說......"
"story.season.s4_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我們會深深感謝你，我們深愛這個地方。"
"story.season.s4_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我們失去了一切。"
"story.season.s4_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","在英雄們正搜尋魯海德的同時，莫羅和伊麗莎白之間正起爭執。"
"story.season.s4_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","帶我跟你去吧，親愛的。我厭倦了跟這些笨蛋戰鬥。"
"story.season.s4_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","嗯......對，關於這點。你比大多數伊麗莎白還懂我。"
"story.season.s4_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","你也知道我不喜歡分享。感謝你的幫助，美女。"
"story.season.s4_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","不過我恐怕得說再見了。"
"story.season.s4_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","什麼？不可以！你不可以把我跟這群人丟在一起！莫羅！莫羅！"
"story.season.s4_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","你想要阻止這個可惡的賤人？想要粉碎他的夢想？那好吧。"
"story.season.s4_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","仔細聽好，我會告訴你怎麼做。"
"story.season.s4_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","莫羅試著控制伊麗莎白的神智時，詭異的排笛音樂響遍營地。"
"story.season.s4_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","「我不能洩漏莫羅的計畫......」"
"story.season.s4_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我不能洩漏莫羅的計畫......"
"story.season.s4_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我們得停下那些排笛！"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","伊麗莎白正在抵抗莫羅的神智控制。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","莫羅......想要控制......造物主。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","熵自身......發出了聲音。呃......"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","伊麗莎白癱倒在地上，了無生息。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","英雄在目睹到造物主的力量後踉蹌不已。某個事物引起他們的注意力。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我是該聲音的傳遞者。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","離開......或是毀滅。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","造物主是這麼說的。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","噢，不，我們的王啊。那樂曲帶走了我們的王......"
"story.season.s4_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","請救救他，英雄們。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","魯海德掙脫了莫羅的控制。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","英雄們......感謝你們......不過你們來得太遲了。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","歌曲已被傳唱。禁錮造物主的來世牢獄之牆......已經崩毀。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","僅存尾聲。最後......"
"story.season.s4_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","......讓莫羅吟唱，就能使造物主重返這個世界。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我的朋友......你們的王......辜負了你們。"
"story.season.s4_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","英雄們，你們是僅存的希望。請勇往直前，挽回莫羅所做的一切。"
"story.season.s4_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我在這，傻瓜們。而且我並不是孤軍奮戰。"
"story.season.s4_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","為什麼，這裡有你的老朋友。"
"story.season.s4_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我很確定他很想再和你一戰......"
"story.season.s4_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","莫羅！立即停下你的煉獄遊戲！"
"story.season.s4_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","艾琳娜，注意禮貌。你的朋友還挺享受的。"
"story.season.s4_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你在說什麼？"
"story.season.s4_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","艾琳娜、理查德、薇薇卡。幫幫我。我招架不住了！"
"story.season.s4_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","阿克洛格？！造物主想要控制你的神智。你得堅強點！"
"story.season.s4_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","阿克洛格的雙眼轉黑，並舉起拳頭。"
"story.season.s4_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","......"
"story.season.s4_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","阿克洛格，別放棄！我們得想點辦法。"
"story.season.s4_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","啊，我感覺比以往更加強大。比任何在我面前的莫洛克人還要強大。"
"story.season.s4_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","糟糕！"
"story.season.s4_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","阿克洛格，這才不是真正的你。我們不想和你戰鬥。你得恢復過來！"
"story.season.s4_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我才不要恢復。我聽到了一些事物。美麗的事物。"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","阿克洛格雖然受了傷，但似乎從超凡音樂的效果中解放出來。"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","啊，地上的居民們......發生什麼事了？"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","是莫羅搞的鬼。後來造物主附身到了你身上。"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","你也看到造物主對我做了什麼。就差一點。差一點就會......"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","震耳欲聾的音樂逐漸響起......造物主出現了！"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","英雄們目睹造物主在他們面前降臨。"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","我前來拿取容器。"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","沒錯！等等。容器？不！這跟我們說好的不一樣！不！"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","莫羅被造物主的音樂給迷住了。"
"story.season.s4_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","我將重奪此領域。以及領內的住民。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這可不是你的領域，惡魔！"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這是我的地盤，而地底荒野僅是其中一小部分。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我的領域是沒有邊界的。萬物都是我的領域。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","夠了！很榮幸認識你，先生。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","奧達，我的達令。也許你現在該離開了。活著才能訴說我們旅程的冒險故事。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","不要。我要和朋友並肩作戰。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","那就這麼決定了。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","是時候來糾正不幸犯下的錯誤了。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","至死方休。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","衝啊啊啊啊啊啊！！"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","塵埃落定，莫羅似乎重奪他的神智。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","呃啊！"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","好吧。還有別的容器，渴望著被填滿。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","造物從沒停止過。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","造物主在一瞬間消失了，在該處留下閃閃發光的粒子漂浮著。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","他......不見了。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","我還活著！"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我想，沒有人可以永遠獲勝。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","大家都沒事吧？"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","莫羅！你是什麼時候跟......那玩意結合的。我們打敗他之前，你知道了什麼？"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","只有......在其衡量你的優勢和弱點。其力量......超越了任何我所見過的一切之上。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","糟糕。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","我們得找到他，然後摧毀它。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我們定會保持警戒！"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","這可跟一般的旅程不一樣。我想弄些茶，有人要嗎？"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","我喜歡茶。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","我們歷經長途跋涉。"
"story.season.s4_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","該回家了。"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","艾琳娜、理查德與薇薇卡。很高興看到你們平安抵達凱密斯。"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我是艾奇拉，而這位是艾茲米亞。"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們誠摯歡迎你們的蒞臨，願你們一切平安。"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我跟艾奇拉為凱密斯海岸看守。"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","很高興見到你們！我們很高興能來這裡！"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","真令人興奮！我等不及要了解更多凱密斯的事了！"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","首先要問的是，在遠處那些三角形建築是什麼？"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我必須說，那些尖尖的巨石可真壯觀！"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","金字塔對我們來說，可是占有重要的地位。我們稱那些「巨石」為金字塔，金字塔是我們祖先的安息之地。"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","金字塔！真有趣！"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","艾茲米亞和艾奇拉，抱歉我們太出神了......我確定我們有很多要緊的事要商量！"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","沒錯，但最重要的是，我們需要繼續前進。"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","等等，在這之前，我想再問個問題......"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","那些生物是什麼？！牠們是在攻擊我們嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","哞喔喔！！！"
"story.season.s5_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","哈，我們打敗這些狂怒野獸了！"
"story.season.s5_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我不太熟悉這區的野生生態......但這些野獸似乎不大對勁！"
"story.season.s5_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","的確。這些野獸不大對勁。我們從未在同一區中看過如此龐大的數量。"
"story.season.s5_province_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們必須繼續前進，以免被牠們龐大的數量所壓倒。"
"story.season.s5_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","剛剛你們擊敗的野獸叫河馬，有人稱牠們為河中的駿馬。"
"story.season.s5_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","真有趣，我可不會把那頭血盆大口的野獸稱作河中的駿馬！"
"story.season.s5_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","牠們以往是相當溫馴的生物......"
"story.season.s5_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","一定是某人或某種原因讓河馬發狂了！我們還不知了解是什麼原因，但肯定是不自然現象！"
"story.season.s5_province_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","說到河馬，我看到更多隻朝我們過來了！"
"story.season.s5_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","河馬到處都是！"
"story.season.s5_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","橫衝直撞的河馬群可真是壯觀啊，但我可不想被這些兇殘的哺乳類動物給踩扁。"
"story.season.s5_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","艾茲米亞，河馬一直都有著這麼華麗的盔甲嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","沒有，盔甲是在牠們性情大變後才出現的......時間點真是可疑。"
"story.season.s5_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","盔甲的來源需要好好調查一番。"
"story.season.s5_province_02.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","來吧，我知道我要去找誰問了。"
"story.season.s5_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","來者何人？我以法老之名命令你們停下，解釋你們來的目的。"
"story.season.s5_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","喔拜託，朱奈德，別再擺架子了！是我跟艾奇拉。"
"story.season.s5_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","但是，呃，我被命令要看管這區的，以法老之名，一點都不能退讓！"
"story.season.s5_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我的老朋友朱奈德，你知道我們生來就是要保衛凱密斯海岸的！我們可是負責擊退危險之人！"
"story.season.s5_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","但......我的職責......"
"story.season.s5_province_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","朱奈德，拜託了！把拳頭揮向河馬，而不是我們！"
"story.season.s5_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這可不對啊！艾茲米亞和艾奇拉，你不能把全副武裝的外國人跟瘋河馬給帶到這裡啊！"
"story.season.s5_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","雖然我在首都不是負責這份工作的，但這份保衛此地的職責，是我僅剩的東西。"
"story.season.s5_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","雖然河馬壓境過後，我猜我就沒什麼東西可以保衛了......"
"story.season.s5_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","老天，朱奈德，沒必要這麼誇張，現在河馬冷靜下來了。"
"story.season.s5_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","至少還有些建築物沒慘遭毒手！"
"story.season.s5_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","這可沒安慰到我多少啊！"
"story.season.s5_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","你到底想要我做什麼？你是為什麼來這裡的？"
"story.season.s5_province_03.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","請仔細聽好，你對首都城市、王朝和法老的知識，可比你想像的還要有用..."
"story.season.s5_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","所以，艾茲米亞，妳是說這塊偉大的土地上會出現危機？而且不只是由河馬帶來的？"
"story.season.s5_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","沒錯，我們最近麻煩可多了......"
"story.season.s5_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","乾旱、蝗災、晚上出沒的奇怪生物，古老故事一一成真。"
"story.season.s5_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","像我這樣的小小地區的看守都親眼見過這些事了。"
"story.season.s5_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","但法老仍保持沈默，就好像他一點都不擔心一樣。"
"story.season.s5_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","但最近的攻擊可是身為法老無法置之不理的啊！"
"story.season.s5_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","而妳們的村莊也不是唯一被夷平的災區，對吧？"
"story.season.s5_province_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","沒錯，我們收到了來自附近多座村莊的消息，全都是由野生動物或怪物造成的攻擊事件......"
"story.season.s5_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這裡的鄉村風景的確很漂亮！還充滿著怪物等著我們交戰呢！"
"story.season.s5_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你在說什麼呢，旅行者，難道說你們來的地方怪物不夠多嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","這個嘛，我們的家鄉也是有很多的兇猛怪物！"
"story.season.s5_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","但我覺得在旅途路上看到不同種的怪物，也挺新鮮的！"
"story.season.s5_province_04.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","是蠻新鮮的，如果是薇薇卡的話，一定會說這很有教育意義！"
"story.season.s5_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","快看！皇家衛隊的瓦卡斯靠近了。他可是從首都來的！"
"story.season.s5_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","請注意，各位旅行者們！凱密斯的統治者、開薩之父、帝國賢者、法老托勒密邀請你們進宮接見。"
"story.season.s5_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","你說什麼？瑪瑙？"
"story.season.s5_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","理查德，你耳朵積太多沙子了嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","凱密斯這塊土地上的統治者就稱為法老！"
"story.season.s5_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","托勒密就是法老！而且他想見我們！天啊！"
"story.season.s5_province_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你好，皇家守衛。我們去陰涼處討論事情吧。我們不習慣凱密斯白天的炎熱日曬。"
"story.season.s5_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","所以，瓦卡斯，你是法老的守衛？而且還是傳令官？"
"story.season.s5_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","沒錯，我是開薩軍隊內速度最快的上尉。法老一聽到你們即將來訪，就派我立即趕到。"
"story.season.s5_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","嗯哼，法老連跑步都不會！"
"story.season.s5_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","肅靜，平民！別侮辱法老！"
"story.season.s5_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","......僅管他的確很令人捉摸不定......"
"story.season.s5_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","請大家都先冷靜冷靜，好嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","當然。"
"story.season.s5_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","嗯哼，好，讓我來告訴你目前沙丘王朝所面臨的禍害......"
"story.season.s5_province_05.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","日落時，英雄們紮營，聆聽著法老想傳達的訊息。"
"story.season.s5_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","睿智的法老預見了我們深愛的城市開薩可能即將遭到攻擊。"
"story.season.s5_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","因此，各位來自遙遠異地的強大英雄們，將作為法老最尊貴的客人，受邀至開薩。"
"story.season.s5_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","尊客？法老不知道他的領地早就被攻擊了？"
"story.season.s5_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","妳是說河馬跟鱷魚？幾隻流浪動物是無法撼動偉大帝國的！"
"story.season.s5_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","那可不是什麼流浪動物！這些可是數量如同沙粒那麼多的生物啊，且都穿著黃金與寶石裝飾的盔甲！"
"story.season.s5_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","......盔甲是放在法老的金庫裡......"
"story.season.s5_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","朱奈德，謹言慎行啊！我記得你是來自開薩駐軍......你曾是高貴的戰士。"
"story.season.s5_province_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","但背後侮辱法老顯示出你沈淪有多深！"
"story.season.s5_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","英雄們了解到，除了神秘怪物的威脅之外，還出現了另一個危機。而且凱密斯人民的內部也充滿分歧。"
"story.season.s5_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","沒錯，我們也親眼目睹了！這幾天內，我們的新朋友們什麼也沒做，就只知道鬧內鬨。"
"story.season.s5_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","這可真煩人啊，這些地方肯定有發生什麼事......"
"story.season.s5_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","但如果大家都在吵個沒完的話，我們根本無法找出任何頭緒！"
"story.season.s5_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","在英雄們走近一條河流時，注意到了有兩名古怪之人正在激烈討論某件事。"
"story.season.s5_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","河岸是由我管，而不是妳！你只是水靈而已！"
"story.season.s5_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","呸！你只是滿身跳蚤的三流神祇！你在這根本沒什麼神力！"
"story.season.s5_province_06.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","糟糕......今天真是壞事連連......"
"story.season.s5_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這裡是由我來管！聽到沒！"
"story.season.s5_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","河流賦予大力生命，而我就是河中神靈！"
"story.season.s5_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","貝努是保護我們土地中的最初神祇，他說的比較有理。"
"story.season.s5_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","但為什麼貝努要干涉河中神靈的事呢？"
"story.season.s5_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","不管誰對誰錯，他們的爭吵造成了很大的問題......"
"story.season.s5_province_07.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","快看！他們越是爭吵，就有越多在地生物變成怪物！"
"story.season.s5_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","為什麼貝努和艾爾娜妲哈都在攻擊我們？眾神不是應該站在我們這邊的嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","哈，我完全感不到意外！"
"story.season.s5_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我們對於神的惡意有很多經驗。"
"story.season.s5_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","的確，在我們旅途中所見到的強大且有智慧的存在，都傾向訴諸暴力。"
"story.season.s5_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","但別怕！沒有是我錘子解決不了的事！"
"story.season.s5_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","對，要徹底把問題解決是需要智慧跟手段的，但如果要到那邊，我們可能得把自己保護好。"
"story.season.s5_province_07.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","現在當然是後者。讓我們先下手為強來保衛我們自身吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","所以現在到底是發生什麼事......為什麼艾爾娜妲哈要離開自己的河呢？"
"story.season.s5_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","她是河中神靈，河水的美麗化身......卻也是危險的化身。"
"story.season.s5_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","沒錯，河流跟艾爾娜妲哈自身都十分危險！聽說人們有時會被艾爾娜妲哈引誘入河！"
"story.season.s5_province_08.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","不過，是什麼讓她這麼憤怒呢？而且為何連同溫和的神祇貝努也牽扯其中？"
"story.season.s5_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我仍然不敢置信，偉大的貝努跟艾爾娜妲哈居然在互相廝殺？"
"story.season.s5_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","而且還我們出手了！別忘了附近的人也遭受了波及。"
"story.season.s5_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","朱奈德，我看得出來。而且我也知道你仍然善於戰鬥，僅管你離開法老守衛一職很多年了。"
"story.season.s5_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","人可不能忘本。"
"story.season.s5_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","嗯，我可能錯怪你了，雖然你最近看起來像是一介村莊守衛，但人不可貌相。"
"story.season.s5_province_08.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","希望如此，要是我們哪個人實力虛弱，我們可就會在半路出局了！"
"story.season.s5_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","該死！笨鳥跟笨河神根本沒完沒了！"
"story.season.s5_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","小心說話！我們的眾神可不笨！但祂們的行為是真的毫無道理可言......"
"story.season.s5_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","就好像他們聽不到彼此一樣。"
"story.season.s5_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","他們會比較聽得到我們嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","什麼？你是說，我們要去跟祂們講道理，而不是直接跟祂們交戰？"
"story.season.s5_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","就剩下講道理還沒試過了。"
"story.season.s5_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","是啊，這可能會有效......"
"story.season.s5_province_09.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","很好。就像你所說的，我們已經跟祂們交戰很多次了......來看看我們能不能好好談談吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","再次與貝努及艾爾娜妲哈戰鬥之後，英雄們終於有機會與祂們談話......"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","神靈啊！請聽聽我們要說的話！"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","什麼？人類有話要說？"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","真稀奇，不知道為何我聽人類說話比聽笨鳥說話還要清楚。"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","你們是我們土地的一切，現在我們請你們放下成見，停止爭吵！"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我們深愛的帝國到處發生奇怪且駭人的怪事。"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","你們皆有神力讓河岸的怪物冷靜下來。"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","請看看四周，混沌吞噬了你們的美麗河流與豐饒之地！"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","..."
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","..."
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","他們恢復理智了嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_09.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","還是仍沈浸在憤怒之中太深？"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","兩位神恢復理智了。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","謝謝你們的努力，英雄們。我們尋求你們的協助是對的。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","真令人困惑。就好像有個魔咒在束縛著我。讓我失去理智。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","真讓人擔心。可能是因為狂歡的關係嗎？無論如何，總之我們先修補殘骸吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我們的土地正在被劫掠。事情好像不太對勁。請幫助我們。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","照理來說，在發揮我的力量後，河中野獸的怒氣應該會慢慢平息下來。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","但是我覺得我和貝努的爭執並不是這些混亂的起源...而僅是混亂的徵兆。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","沒錯。小傢伙，前往西邊吧。你的嚮導在等著你呢。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","西邊是廢棄古墓的方向。不會有人在那裡的。嚮導...？"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","往法老的路不是在東邊嗎？我們會繞遠路。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","聽從貝努的指引才是明智的。我可以告訴法老我們會有所耽擱。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","好的。艾茲米亞，我會回去幫助我們的人民。你和英雄繼續前進吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","好的。注意安全。我們一定會查明真相的。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","團隊抵達了古墓。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","強大的英雄們，我現在要前往開薩，和法老解釋情況。他會在那裡等你的。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","沒問題。我們這裡的事結束之後，就會前往首都。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","太好了。我們會為你們艱辛的旅程準備一場歡迎盛宴。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","太棒了！"
"story.season.s5_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","看到你平安無事真是太好了，朱奈德。願我們在太陽下再次相見。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","...我也有同感。"
"story.season.s5_province_10.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我們進去裡面吧。我很好奇我們的嚮導是誰...還有為啥會在這種廢棄古墓等我們。"
"story.season.s5_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這些古墓真是令人讚嘆...但也讓人非常不安。我覺得很緊張。"
"story.season.s5_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","古墓雖然被遺棄了，但陳設看起來滿標準的。我覺得沒什麼好擔心的。"
"story.season.s5_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","如果有些火把就好了。而且我也不太喜歡這些聖甲蟲。"
"story.season.s5_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","等等！你有看到那隻貓嗎...在遠遠那一邊？"
"story.season.s5_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","哪裡有貓啊？我什麼都沒看到。"
"story.season.s5_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我覺得牠在告訴我們要跟著走！走吧，我們跟上去。"
"story.season.s5_province_11.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","等等！別這樣魯莽地冒然前進！"
"story.season.s5_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","理查德，你要為自己的行為解釋一下嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你帶我們走進一群敵人裡了！這些貓是木乃伊！"
"story.season.s5_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","真的很抱歉！但是我發誓我看到的那隻貓不一樣。那隻貓不是木乃伊。"
"story.season.s5_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們到這裡之後，就只是一直在和怪物對戰。為什麼貝努要叫我們來這裡？"
"story.season.s5_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","相信我們很快就會知道了。要有信心...他從來沒有引領我們走上錯誤的道路。"
"story.season.s5_province_11.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","現在光說也沒有用了。我們繼續前進吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","真耐人尋味！這邊的古墓就有點亮火把。"
"story.season.s5_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這不應該是這樣的。有人最近來過這裡。保持警戒。"
"story.season.s5_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","一個健壯的身影從大廳盡頭的暗影中出現。"
"story.season.s5_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","以法老之名...報上你的名號...不然有你受的！我可是有...呃...武器的！"
"story.season.s5_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","等等，我認得這個聲音。難道是...嘿，亞里福，是你嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","艾茲米亞？朱奈德？太好了！我得救了！呃...這些外國人是誰？"
"story.season.s5_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你在這種地方幹什麼啊？你不是應該在開薩嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我聽說這裡有可以讓托勒密法老回春的墜飾..."
"story.season.s5_province_12.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","我們晚點再聊吧！有更多怪物往這邊來了。快舉起你的劍！"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","感謝老天...如果你們沒有找到我，我可能就要餓死了。"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","你這個白癡抄寫員。如果你告訴我們的話，我或艾茲米亞都會陪你來的。"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你自己一個人跑到這裡來，到底在想什麼啊？真是魯莽！就跟平常一樣！"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","但是他看起來一點都不像有經過苦戰。他是怎麼走到古墓這裡的？"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","有個神祕的暗影一直把怪物引離我的道路。真是超古怪的！"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","等等。那個暗影看起來像一隻貓嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","現在我回想起來，還真的有點像耶。很可能是一隻貓。"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我就說有一隻貓吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","注意你的音量，理查德！我的耳朵都轟隆作響了。"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","總之，我想你說得沒錯，艾茲米亞。貝努要我們到這裡是有理由的。"
"story.season.s5_province_12.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","我也不想聽起來太像旁邊那位男士，但是...我就說吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","眾人就快到出口了，但怪物還是在追趕他們。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","該死。他們為什麼不留在他們的領地？"
"story.season.s5_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","可能是因為我們身上的墜飾。肯定是墜飾吸引了怪物。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我無所謂！這樣我就可以用錘子砸更多東西了！"
"story.season.s5_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我只是很高興我們終於不用打河馬了。我真的不想在地下古墓遇到河馬。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","多虧了艾爾娜妲哈，現在牠們大概在我們上方某處的草叢裡放鬆吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","或是在河裡游泳。總之，我們繼續往前，然後離開這裡吧。目標是前往更綠油油的牧草地。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","眾神一直在密切注視一行人橫跨凱密斯的旅程。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","真令人驚訝。冥界的小傢伙們過得滿好的嘛...甚至有點好過頭了。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","不！他們第一場真正的試煉才正要開始呢。很少凡人可以跟帕派羅斯對抗的，更別說是索貝克了。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","也許吧。那些墮落的生物是不會輕易屈服的。但是，我更希望凡人能夠戰勝。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","的確。前方還有重重挑戰呢，但是他們已經開始接觸到這次狂歡的表面了。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","沒錯，說到接觸...芭絲特跑到哪裡去了？"
"story.season.s5_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","奇怪。牠幾天前跑出去散步。可能還在外面吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_13.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","太棒了..."
"story.season.s5_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我想這些就是最後的古墓怪物了。大家幹得好！"
"story.season.s5_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","等等，你看！前方有更多敵人。"
"story.season.s5_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","不...怎麼會？這裡是法老的森林。不應該有敵人踏進這裡的！"
"story.season.s5_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我簡直不敢相信。凱密斯到底發生什麼事了？"
"story.season.s5_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","悲慘的是，這些異端已經在這個地區肆虐一陣子了。"
"story.season.s5_province_14.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","這就不妙了。這些敵人看起來受過訓練。我們小心前進吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這不可能啊！沒有凡人可以抵抗我砂巨像的實力的。"
"story.season.s5_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","太驚人了！你們英雄做到連法老守衛都做不到的事！"
"story.season.s5_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","所以守衛現在已經弱到這種程度了。真是可悲。難怪什麼事都做不好。"
"story.season.s5_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","朱奈德，我知道你從來都不聽勸，但是在官員面前講話注意一點！"
"story.season.s5_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","尤其是在如此尊貴的外國來賓面前！噢，如果瓦卡斯在這裡就好了！"
"story.season.s5_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","嘿，各位，我覺得這個壞蛋好像想來點浮誇的發言。"
"story.season.s5_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","哼！你們不會是索貝克的對手。你們放手試試看吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我們一定會的。"
"story.season.s5_province_14.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","他說得一點都不浮誇嘛！"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們高興我們有取得新的進展，但是我開始想念我家裡的兒子了。"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我也很想我的女兒，但是我相信艾奇拉有好好照顧大家。"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","噢，我不擔心，我知道她很會帶小孩。我只是覺得有點想家了。"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","嘿，朱奈德，如果你不介意我問一下的話，為什麼你要退出法老守衛的行列呢？"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","這說來話長。"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","這故事真的很長！你不會想從頭到尾聽完的！"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","簡單來說，我失去對於王國的信心，並且決定親手保護我的人民。"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我必須承認，凱密斯現在正在經歷一段黑暗時期。但是我相信法老會帶我們重回往日榮耀的。"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","就跟平常一樣，我們只好各持己見了。當然，我們還是互相尊重對方。"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","等等...前方有敵人！他們一定是索貝克的軍隊。"
"story.season.s5_province_15.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我們再次從上方進攻吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","太好了！你們這些雜種知道該怎麼戰鬥！尤其是手持錘子的那位！"
"story.season.s5_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","以此當作健身也滿不錯的嘛。"
"story.season.s5_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","真是強大的力量！我相信有了你的幫助，開薩就可以抵抗任何襲擊！"
"story.season.s5_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","你錯了！你們這些傻瓜已經太遲了。時辰已近！凱密斯很快就會回到真正的統治者手上了！"
"story.season.s5_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","你說凱密斯的人民嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","哈！凡人...我會在幾世紀之後，想起你講的笑話！太好笑了！啊哈哈哈！"
"story.season.s5_province_15.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","快點，趁他忙著笑的時候趕緊前進吧。我們就快要到首都了！"
"story.season.s5_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","團隊到達了開薩郊區。"
"story.season.s5_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","站住！以法老之...等等，亞里福？你怎麼會到這麼遠的地方？"
"story.season.s5_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","再次見到你真好，瓦卡斯！說來話長。先讓我們帶貴賓進城吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","沒問題。強大的英雄們，讓我歡迎你們來到開薩！你們真是來得正好！"
"story.season.s5_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我們剛剛被通知，有場入侵即將來襲。敵人正在接近了。我們請求你們的幫助！"
"story.season.s5_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","瓦卡斯匆忙地帶領著團隊來到由克麗奧佩脫拉及其部隊看守的城鎮入口。"
"story.season.s5_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","站住！這是怎麼回事，瓦卡斯？這些奇裝異服又臉色蒼白的異教徒是誰？"
"story.season.s5_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","仁慈的克麗奧佩脫拉女士！請讓我解釋..."
"story.season.s5_province_16.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","守衛！抓住入侵者！"
"story.season.s5_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","抱歉。我不知道你是法老的貴賓。"
"story.season.s5_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","這都是我一個人的錯，克麗奧佩脫拉女士！是我沒有提前告知妳！"
"story.season.s5_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","沒有關係的...我很欣賞妳的警戒心。妳城鎮的防衛看起來維持得很好。"
"story.season.s5_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","通常是滿好的，但現在並非如此。我們急需像你們這樣的強大戰士。"
"story.season.s5_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","瓦卡斯告訴我們現在的狀況了！我們趕快進到裡面，並且開始準備吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","說得好！請跟著我到兵營。我之後會為自己的過錯贖罪。"
"story.season.s5_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","對了，你們在過來的路上有看到一隻貓嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_16.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","沒有吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","一大群敵人從四面八方衝進開薩。一名不死統治者率領著軍隊。"
"story.season.s5_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","守衛！入侵者來襲了！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","高尚的英雄們，請原諒我只能短暫歡迎你們。看來禍害已經到達凱密斯了。"
"story.season.s5_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","陛下，恕我直言，禍害已經..."
"story.season.s5_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","現在不是講這個的時機，朱奈德！來吧，我們要走了！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","大家就戰鬥位置！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你們真正的女王終於來了！凱密斯的人民，放下武器投降吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","這會是...不，不可能啊！已故的亞赫特波法老？...怎麼會這樣呢？"
"story.season.s5_province_17.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","進攻！勝利女神將對我們微笑！膽敢反抗的人我絕不放過！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","亞赫特波的軍隊遭到重創，開始狼狽逃竄了。"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","敵人撤退了！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你們這些人渣會為你們的背叛付出代價！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我想他們會回來的，但是至少我們贏了，雖然我們也損失了一些兵力。"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我們下次會準備得更周全的。再次謝謝你們的協助，英雄們。"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","凱密斯永遠欠你們一份恩情，英勇的英雄們！太陽會永遠對你們微笑的。"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","我們前往農田來享受盛大慶宴，以慶祝遲來的歡迎派對和這次的勝利吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","聽起來太棒了！"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","我會待在城裡，並且處理任何可能出現的緊急行政事務。亞里福？"
"story.season.s5_province_17.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","我隨時為您效勞，克麗奧佩脫拉女士。請大家好好享受這場盛宴吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這是我吃過最美味的一餐！而且我們可是吃過五種不同世界的食物呢！"
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","那當然！我就住在這裡，但是桌上的食物我連半個都沒見過。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","可惜克麗奧佩脫拉女士沒辦法參加。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我很欣賞她。我們遇過的王室成員中，很少有人能夠像她這麼警戒、勇猛又有責任感。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我們都有同感。我相信她現在已經準備好帶領凱密斯重回往日榮耀了。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","陛下...？"
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","在過去的幾年裡，王國經歷了黑暗時期。統治者必須承擔責任。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我的思緒變得遲鈍...眾神也離我們越來越遠。也許這本身就是一個徵兆..."
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","陛下！很抱歉打壞了歡慶的氣氛，但是敵人正大舉入侵國界！"
"story.season.s5_province_18.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","抄起武器！保護法老！"
"story.season.s5_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","那位木乃伊女王可真固執，對吧？帶著殘兵也要發動第二次攻擊..."
"story.season.s5_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","儘管我的心智如此衰弱，但我不相信這一切都是她做的。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","陛下，是不是開薩裡面有叛徒？叛國者必須處以死刑！"
"story.season.s5_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","不會有法老願意為了再度取得統治權，而從來世中甦醒...恐怕眾神有參與其中。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","遙遠的東方藏有一座神聖的金字塔。也許在那裡可以找到答案。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","法斯！過來這裡。你可以帶這些法老的賓客到皇家水池去嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","遵命，主人。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","他們是強大的戰士，所以安全不是問題。你跟到水池就可以了。"
"story.season.s5_province_18.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","好的，主人。尊貴的賓客們，請跟著我往這邊走。"
"story.season.s5_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","飛鷹翱翔天際，皇家池不遠了。但一路走去可會繞圈子。"
"story.season.s5_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","如果我記得沒錯的話，我們需要一路跋涉至旭日之落，並繞過瀑布而行。"
"story.season.s5_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","沒錯，先生。由於汛期的緣故，實際的道路每年都會發生些微變動，但我們都是繞著瀑布而行。"
"story.season.s5_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","開薩一切都安好嗎？我們來自港口區。你有聽說過河馬的事，對吧？"
"story.season.s5_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","可不是嗎？夫人。那些河馬之前也有來過這裡。更不用那些強盜和怪物了。"
"story.season.s5_province_19.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","到旭日之落的路很遠，對吧？在路上有很多時間分享我們各自悲慘的故事。"
"story.season.s5_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","在開薩內謠傳著出現了三位強大的英雄前來幫忙。看來傳言是真的！"
"story.season.s5_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","哼，這些敵人根本比不上...他叫什麼來著...那個持刀的鱷魚男？"
"story.season.s5_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你是在說索貝克？"
"story.season.s5_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","索貝克...索貝克？怎麼會？我無法相信有凡人能挺過眾神之怒。"
"story.season.s5_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我知道聽起來很難以置信，但事實就是這樣。我們是從港口一路跋山涉水而來的。"
"story.season.s5_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","貝努、艾爾娜妲哈、帕派羅斯...我們有跟蠻多神祇進行過戰鬥，對吧？"
"story.season.s5_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","還有瘋狂河馬群、木乃伊貓跟不死法老。一刻都不得閒。"
"story.season.s5_province_19.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","哇，我真的很愛照料我的作物，但在這種時期，我真希望我是個冒險家！"
"story.season.s5_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","啊。我還處於目瞪口呆中...已逝的亞赫特波法老，是嗎？他變成了不死者...就像那樣。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我有同感！而且那感覺不太像是巫術。我感應不到任何魔法。真奇怪！"
"story.season.s5_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","托勒密法老說得對。起先是河馬穿皇家護甲，然後現在又是這個...凡人可沒這種能耐。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","但我想不通，神做這些事能得到什麼？"
"story.season.s5_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","有著飛鷹頭的人物頂著刺眼陽光，突然在一行人面前現身。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","請停下腳步！我已久候你們的到來。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","該不會是...不會吧！荷魯斯守護神！"
"story.season.s5_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","太棒了！你們證明了你們有資格接受前方的挑戰。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","居然能見到荷魯斯守護神本人...身為凱密斯守衛，沒什麼比這件事還要光榮的了。我此生無憾了。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","聽著！這些偉大之地最近深陷混亂之中...你們都很清楚這件事。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","和諧。秩序。你們必須恢復這些屬於太陽的榮耀。同時找到並且擊敗引發混亂的始作俑者。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","賽特！這人可是惡名遠播。他並非什麼弱小的對手，但也不是無堅不摧。我們好好讓他知道這點吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","交給我們去辦吧。我們發誓會保護我們的土地免於任何威脅，即便是...與眾神開戰。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","還請在旅程中照看著我們。"
"story.season.s5_province_20.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","很好。別擔心...你們會感應到我視線的存在。"
"story.season.s5_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","呃...很抱歉我們孤陋寡聞，但誰是「賽特」？"
"story.season.s5_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","哎呦，別道歉 ... 我們沒奢求外地人能了解我們的神明！那不太現實。"
"story.season.s5_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","荷魯斯跟賽特互為敵人，他們的仇恨甚至在我出生前就已經結下了。而且似乎越演越烈。"
"story.season.s5_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","賽特可是時常試圖引發毀滅的惡神，而荷魯斯則是保護凱密斯與其眾生的守護神。"
"story.season.s5_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","嗯，我們有很多跟惡神對抗的經驗。感覺我們跟惡神很有緣。"
"story.season.s5_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","另一名有著飛鷹頭的人物突然從附近沙丘陰影出現。"
"story.season.s5_province_21.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","嗯？已經到了嗎？太棒了！還真快啊！"
"story.season.s5_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","太棒了！你跟荷魯斯所說的一樣厲害...也和我期望的一樣。"
"story.season.s5_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","嗯，所以你也是好人，對嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","唉！你也太頭腦簡單了吧...看來你的智力完全不及你的蠻力。"
"story.season.s5_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","善？惡？這些概念只不過是世俗之物。我猜你是想問我是不是反對賽特？如果是這樣，沒錯。"
"story.season.s5_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","請允許我冒昧一下...荷魯斯守護神委任我們來阻止賽特。能請你以你的智慧保佑我們嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","托勒密法老囑咐我們前往避世金字塔。我們這樣做是正確的嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","托勒密？真是耐人尋味的消息啊。也許他比我們認為的還要睿智..."
"story.season.s5_province_21.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","繼續前進吧！聽從你們統治者的號令繼續進行。越深入就能揭露越多事件的樣貌。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這區域四周的地形自從我上次來過就改變許多。雖然那是好久以前的事。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","朱奈德，你聽起來又像老頭子一樣了。但沒錯，如果沒有法斯在的話，我們早就迷路或是遇到危險了。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","多虧了他，我們才無視很多冤枉路，因此節省了許多時間！"
"story.season.s5_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","以瓦卡斯的智商，真難得他能推薦這麼棒的嚮導。法斯，感謝你的幫忙。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","這算不了什麼，先生。沒剩多遠的路了...我們幾乎快到綠洲了。再過幾個沙丘就到了。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","對了，聽說最近有人發現新品種的聖甲蟲。不知道我們能不能見到！"
"story.season.s5_province_22.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我們接下來最好提高警覺。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我們什麼大風大浪沒見過，但黏性爆炸甲蟲？我可不記得之前有遇過這種生物。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","對啊，但至少牠們無法承受你的治療咒語。這是好事一樁。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","許多凱密斯聖甲蟲有著不可思議且近乎神奇的特性。就算對我們來說，牠們也是十分神秘。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","所以你認為這是一項特色？"
"story.season.s5_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","爆炸倒是沒讓我嚇到，不過聖甲蟲不該充滿敵意。一定出事了。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","真好奇為何我們遇到的敵人首領沒說出什麼秘密，其他跟我們戰鬥過的首領都會透露一些資訊的。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","你感到...「蟲蟲」困擾嗎？嘻嘻。"
"story.season.s5_province_22.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","走開，理查德。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","終於啊！我們到達綠洲區的邊緣了...等等，怎麼回事？"
"story.season.s5_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","好多聖甲蟲...直接湧入了這個地方，看起來很兇猛。這不正常吧？"
"story.season.s5_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","絕對不正常。真是怪異的一幕。看來我們要一路掃蕩聖甲蟲，直到抵達池子。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","似乎沒有任何地方能避免這場禍害。在這節骨眼上，倒是讓我開始想念起與瘋狂河馬戰鬥的時光了。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我得說，我還蠻善於處理蟲蟲問題的，但就連我都對這樣的情況感到可怕。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","嗯，又有更多理由得快點把賽特打倒了。我們走吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","厲害。從我們的戰鬥來看，你應該能輕鬆清出一條路。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","這場...害蟲侵擾，不是你做的對吧？你看起來不是對我們放出甲蟲的兇手。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","沒錯，牠們不再回應號令了。有股邪惡力量把牠們給圍住，就像沙塵暴那般。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","小心！現在我可以把牠們控制在這區。但撐不了太久，一旦牠們了逃出去...死亡將如影隨形。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","史庫拉鐵克...你一定有在來這裡的路上見過他。他也被影響了。他有危害他人嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","他造成的危害很輕微！不過他不怎麼說話。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","真是令人振奮，趁現在太陽高掛時，往前邁進吧。你不會想在入夜時還待在這裡的。"
"story.season.s5_province_23.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我完全理解！"
"story.season.s5_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","感謝蒼天！至少法老的兩座池子免於聖甲蟲的破壞。前哨站也看起來完好無損！"
"story.season.s5_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","真是太感謝凱布利幫忙將這些東西困在那裡了，他總是照顧著我們。"
"story.season.s5_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","想像一下牠們一路蔓延到村莊中的可怕景象。我們必須在牠們掙脫凱布利的控制前找到賽特。"
"story.season.s5_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","不論如何，法斯，感謝你幫我們到達這裡。你打算怎麼回到開薩？一定不會是現在自己回去吧？"
"story.season.s5_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","別擔心我！我之前也曾引領別人來到這裡。我會待在前哨站，等下一班巡邏的到來。"
"story.season.s5_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","雖然這只是短暫相處，但很榮幸能成為你們的嚮導。凱密斯的命運就交給你們了。"
"story.season.s5_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我們會竭盡所能的。希望能我們能再次相見，法斯。請代我們向瓦卡斯致上最誠摯的問候。"
"story.season.s5_province_24.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","...雖然這只會讓他更自負。總之，我們繼續前進吧。我想金字塔是...這邊。"
"story.season.s5_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","哈！你們這些雜種又再次讓我感到有趣了！娛樂性滿分！你們可以通過了！"
"story.season.s5_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我確實沒想到會再次見到你！但還是感謝你讓我們通過..."
"story.season.s5_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","為什麼你一直跟著我們到這裡？你是想拖慢我們嗎？你是跟賽特一夥的嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","「一夥的」？又是另一個愚蠢的人類概念。神這樣的強大存在根本不需要同盟關係！"
"story.season.s5_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","愚蠢！你們可以盡量抱團取暖。就連僅僅一隻泰坦，也能輕鬆粉碎至少三十名凡人！"
"story.season.s5_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","嗯，事實上..."
"story.season.s5_province_24.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","他說我們可以通過，我們正趕時間呢！快快，趁他還沒改變心意前，我們快通過吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","等等。那棵樹下有人正向我們揮手。也許不是敵人，但靠近時還是小心謹慎一點。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","一行人在山腳下遇到了一位非常熟悉的臉孔。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","艾奇拉？喔，天啊！你是怎麼到這裡的？大家都有安全回去了嗎？河馬都不見了嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","多虧艾爾娜妲哈的保護跟大家的努力，港口附近的一切都恢復正常了。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我路上也有停留在開薩，並聽到了有關於你們的事蹟。你們都被視為英雄。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","哇，真是好消息！"
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","那你怎麼這麼快從港口一路到這裡的？我們可是從開薩花了好長一段時間才到這裡！"
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","河馬群消停下來後，就開始有船航行了。總之，我聽說法老要你們去..."
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","前往避世金字塔，沒錯。但離我上次去的時候，已經有好長一段時間了，所以我不清楚前往該處的路。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","看起來我及時趕回來了。我剛好很了解這個區域，我來帶路吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","路還真是遠啊！我們仍然離山頂有好一段距離。我真是有好一陣子沒爬山了。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","至少路線都標示得蠻清楚的。我猜我們應該可以順暢到達目的地？"
"story.season.s5_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","其實不行。人們在這條路上很常走失。我會說現在我們已身陷危險之中了。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","前方有隱藏的捷徑。走那條路的話，風險會較少。我會去看看路是不是還可以通行。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","艾奇拉獨自衝向前方。其餘一行人則緊跟其後。"
"story.season.s5_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","艾奇拉的知識向來很豐富，但她是怎麼這麼熟悉這...鳥不生蛋的地方？"
"story.season.s5_province_25.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","是啊！我也完全搞不懂。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","地形有點險峻，但這條路似乎讓我們省下了蠻多的時間。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","而且風景很棒！艾奇拉，感謝妳帶我們走這條路。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","困難的路段幾乎要結束了，剩沒多少路了。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","一行人抵達一處空地，遇到了有著獅頭的人物。她示意我們停下。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","等等，那位是神力塞赫麥特！"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","停下！你們一定是荷魯斯所見過的凡人。很高興見到你們。通過這裡後，你們就可以與你們的嚮導重聚。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","嚮導？但法斯在池子那邊。還有，呃，難道是...亞里福？但他怎麼可能會在這裡？不會吧？"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","嗯？她在凡人口中有許多名字與形體，但我半個都沒聽過。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","嘿，也許這是貝努提到的嚮導！我以為那會是亞里福，但也許是別人之類的？"
"story.season.s5_province_26.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","謎語...就留著跟斯芬克斯們玩吧。我是前來測試你的力量，而非你的智慧！舉起你的武器！"
"story.season.s5_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","太棒了。你們全都看來做好萬全準備要迎接前方的任務了。尤其是你，從附近村莊來的。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","這裡有村莊？是誰啊？...喔，那就解釋得出你為何這麼熟悉這地方了！謎團解開了。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我說啊，我只是在那裡出生的，我從那之後就沒到過那裡，我是忠於凱密斯的人們。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","等等，你們在說什麼？所以這裡有村莊...但不是凱密斯的一部分？"
"story.season.s5_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","是，也不是。不太算是村莊，比較算是藏身處。而且住在裡面的人們憎恨目前的皇室。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","極少外地人知道這件事，而且最好保持這樣。我信任你們兩人不會洩漏出去的。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","我可以猜到理由是什麼。我們不需要無謂的流血衝突。別擔心，我們會保守秘密的。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","而且即便知道了理由，也不會讓我們對你有不一樣的態度！我只是讓你知道一下，以防你心有疙瘩。"
"story.season.s5_province_26.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","真感人，但你們沒時間可浪費了。凡人，繼續前行。若順利的話，我們很快會再次見面。"
"story.season.s5_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","各位好！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","嗨，你是我們的嚮導嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","等等...這是在我穿過綠洲時，將聖甲蟲引開的貓。"
"story.season.s5_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","哇...的確是那隻貓耶！來自古墓的貓！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","沒錯！但我有給此形體取名字。對於凡人來說，你還真吵！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","請原諒他，這是老毛病了。你能告訴我們你的大名嗎？如果你不介意的話。"
"story.season.s5_province_27.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","也許吧？如果你能取悅我一下的話。試著抓住我吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","芭絲特，妳跑太快了..."
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","真是愉悅！剛剛的拉鋸戰還真有趣。但我沒跑很快！是你們太慢了！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","總之，現在該來談正事了！你們外地人有聽說過賽特嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","有，我們跟他們詳細說明過了，而且荷魯斯守護神等眾神，有跟我們提到過賽特。"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","很好！所以賽特鄙視目前的統治者，因為他避開賽特轉而膜拜荷魯斯。賽特認為這是一種污辱！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","托勒密...賽特想要用過往的法老來取代他，也就是崇敬他的那一道血脈！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","老實說，這聽起來也太心胸狹隘了吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","亞赫特波！她是賽特的首選。你們阻止了她，所以其他的皇室木乃伊正在準備當中！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","所以賽特從死後世界將靈魂給拖回來，並違反其意願地使役他們？真可怕！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","沒錯，但很多神祇受到輕視時，往往都會做出過分的事。真是不得體！"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","我想我們在其他到過的世界中，已經見夠這種事了..."
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","嗯，我們應該快去避世金字塔。也許我們能阻止賽特復活其他法老。"
"story.season.s5_province_27.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","不太可能！但你們還是得去那座金字塔。現在快啟程吧 ... 直接往南走！"
"story.season.s5_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我對帝國的情況感到十分關切，另一方面，賽特的作為也令人難以想像。"
"story.season.s5_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","就算是法老的死對頭，也不會情願接受不死木乃伊法老統治。"
"story.season.s5_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","這個嘛，我倒不敢說，實情也許會令你大吃一驚。"
"story.season.s5_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","芭絲特說的話，我沒完全聽明白。凱密斯的舊君主為什麼要敬拜像賽特那種神？"
"story.season.s5_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","亞里福曾經跟我說，古人是把賽特當守護神敬拜，就像荷魯斯守護神。"
"story.season.s5_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","就算到了現在，有些地方的人還在默默地敬拜賽特。也許我就知道有這樣的地方......"
"story.season.s5_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","老實說，神祇究竟在做些什麼、甚至有何用意，遠非我們凡人所能瞭解。"
"story.season.s5_province_28.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","不過現在，荷魯斯在保護我們，賽特卻顯然在傷害我們。我只要知道這些就夠了。"
"story.season.s5_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","又是你？你跟賽特是同夥的嗎？"
