"story.season.s5_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","住口！你這骯髒的凡人，竟敢直呼他的名諱。"
"story.season.s5_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","聽說他要讓另一個古代法老復活，是真的嗎？人真能死而復生？"
"story.season.s5_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","哼，你實在太無知。你們這幾個傻瓜，看不出來這地方需要什麼嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","少一些像你這樣的神嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","你們的砂巨像不耐用，有沒有想過選別的材料？"
"story.season.s5_province_28.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","放肆！索貝克很快就會來解決你們。快選個沙丘當自己的墓地吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","帕派羅斯原本也是親和的神嗎？他是受了某種邪惡力量所控制嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","老實說，我什麼都不知道，連他的名字和樣貌都不認得。"
"story.season.s5_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我也是。何況，凱密斯到底有幾位神祇，我們也不得而知。"
"story.season.s5_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","沒錯。不過，說不定亞里福略知一二。"
"story.season.s5_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","也可能帕派羅斯根本不是神！會不會，他只是個強大的下屬？"
"story.season.s5_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","他的頂頭上司會是誰？"
"story.season.s5_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","大家好！"
"story.season.s5_province_29.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","是鱷魚先生！"
"story.season.s5_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","不錯，場面果然壯觀。耍錘子的小伙子，你該加入到我旗下才對！"
"story.season.s5_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","呃......你們看起來挺酷，我也隨時歡迎好好地較量一番，可是，幫助賽特？那似乎跟我不太搭。"
"story.season.s5_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","什麼？他這不是在興起光榮的亂鬥嗎？這地方已沉寂許久，現在不是很好嗎？！"
"story.season.s5_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","要是問我的話，我會說：都是賽特在扭曲他人的心智，造成動盪不安。"
"story.season.s5_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","也許他自有道理，可是一旦他親自率領小兵上前線，那就不行了。"
"story.season.s5_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","說得好。以像你這麼強大的神來說，這種行為哪算是一種支持！"
"story.season.s5_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","像索貝克這種真正無所畏懼的神，不會耍這種繞圈子的縱容手段。"
"story.season.s5_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","嗯！你們凡人確實領會了我的力量和光榮！你們的請求，我會考慮。"
"story.season.s5_province_29.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","就知道您能明白！"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","沒想到索貝克那麼平易近人！對了，也許我們也能說服賽特打消他的念頭！"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這一招之前也曾經有效過，例如當年我們遇到的貝努跟艾爾娜妲哈那一次......"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我的看法倒不樂觀，賽特跟我們之前遇過的神可不相同。"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","一陣冷冽的風，不知怎的也帶有灼熱的沙粒，從這一行人背後吹來。"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","正確，怎麼會──"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","是賽特！敵人來了，備好武器！"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","......無禮！凡人啊，膽敢再插一次嘴，就讓你們刷新何謂痛苦的意義。"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","英雄們！這地方早該整頓一番，別讓那些被洗腦的害蟲給騙倒。"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","正義、秩序，是勇士你的價值觀吧？如果是的話，非常歡迎你們三位加入我們的行列。"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","不，你們的來歷我們清楚，其實，我們是來阻止你們的。"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","沒懂？那很容易解決。我是來此地救苦救難的，難道你們不樂見嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_30.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","跟這個傢伙沒什麼好說的！"
"story.season.s5_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","你真的為了發洩而這麼做？只因為你沒受到足夠的敬拜？"
"story.season.s5_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","真是沒救了，顯然你對批判性思考並不在行。我就大發慈悲，容忍你的無知吧。"
"story.season.s5_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","回答我，這地方的人民看起來像是滿意他們的統治者嗎？他們的王國治理得很好嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","這，也不盡然......"
"story.season.s5_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","很好。難道你們不認為無救的昏君就該由經驗豐富的能君取而代之嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","原則上是沒錯，不過──"
"story.season.s5_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","很好，這就夠了。我們終究會再見面，到時候我會再給你一次臣服的機會。"
"story.season.s5_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","要是拒絕的話......我就認定你跟那些污染你心靈的白癡是一個等級。"
"story.season.s5_province_30.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","孩子們，下課囉。想要的話，可以繼續做你們的小冒險，怎麼做都行。"
"story.season.s5_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","嗨，大夥們，怎麼一個個看起來有些頹喪。有什麼問題嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這......是因為賽特說了一些話。我想阻止他的意願還是沒變，但仍不禁懷疑......"
"story.season.s5_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","......儘管他的做法荒謬，可是，他說的是否有點道理？"
"story.season.s5_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","是啊，史料記載，亞赫特波法老是凱密斯偉大的君主之一，對吧？我們全都聽說過。"
"story.season.s5_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","儘管我有些疑問，但我依舊誓死保護法老的政權以及他的性命。"
"story.season.s5_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","不過，要是有更聰明的法老重新執政，不流血退位是否為合理的方式？"
"story.season.s5_province_31.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","嗯，這個問題，我不知該如何回答，之前我們都沒有需要思考這一點。"
"story.season.s5_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","大家好，目前為止你們已有如此的成就，表現很好。"
"story.season.s5_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","是智者伊西斯！"
"story.season.s5_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","歡迎你們。依你們的表情看來，想必已遇見過賽特。我們的小小鍛鍊，對你們頭腦清醒是否有所幫助？"
"story.season.s5_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們打敗他的承諾依然堅定，可是，懷疑的種子已埋在我們有些人的心中......"
"story.season.s5_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我只能代表自己說話，只能說那種想法還在醞釀之中。"
"story.season.s5_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","可以理解，不用擔心。前往避世金字塔的路上有一座墳，記得去造訪一下。"
"story.season.s5_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","箇中潛藏危險，場面也恐怕不堪入目，不過親眼看見應該能讓你對情況更加清楚。"
"story.season.s5_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我同意，還有，振作精神！我確信你們凡人會獲勝！"
"story.season.s5_province_31.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","芭絲特！經過這麼久，妳到哪裡去了？"
"story.season.s5_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","一行人進入伊西斯提起的陵墓，發現裡頭充斥著木乃伊。"
"story.season.s5_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","伊西斯說得對！看起來挺危險，我也覺得有點噁心。"
"story.season.s5_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","這一幕確實挺嚇人......不過，想必前頭還有更糟糕的景象。"
"story.season.s5_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","至少，有這麼多木乃伊來到這裡，沒有某種領袖帶頭是不可能的。"
"story.season.s5_province_32.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","同意。我們接下來最好提高警覺。"
"story.season.s5_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","做得好，孩子們；不過，你們現在也瞭解，抗拒是多麼的無濟於事。"
"story.season.s5_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","跟已死之人打鬥，是什麼感覺？你想再試一次嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","他們如此放肆，勢必得受懲罰！你們這些賤民，竟敢叨擾凱密斯真正的主子？"
"story.season.s5_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","靜下來，親愛的。只不過是稍許有些延後，那些傻瓜阻礙不了無可避免的命運。"
"story.season.s5_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","這裡頭其他的木乃伊顯然神志不清，不就是妳之前的子民嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","的確！很久以前，他們全都誓言不論生死，皆效忠於我們。天佑這些忠心的子民！"
"story.season.s5_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","忠心？是被洗腦吧？他們好像沒有一點理智或組織。你們做了些什麼？"
"story.season.s5_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","當心口舌，你這人渣──也不必啦，這不重要。很快你的舌頭就沒用了。"
"story.season.s5_province_32.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","可能根本沒有舌頭吧！親愛的，別讓他們壞了你的心情，就隨他們叨叨唸唸地走出去。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","一行人終於來到避世金字塔，並且入內。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","好多木乃伊......在陵墓裡已經看見很多，沒想到這裡還有更多。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","正如托勒密法老所料，其中一定有問題。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","真心希望不會又是我們剛見過的那兩位似的癲狂前法老。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","事不宜遲，我們趕緊查個水落石出，為了凱密斯！"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","瑪亞特搖頭晃腦，一邊緩慢地眨眼，有如剛從昏迷中醒來。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","呃......這是哪裡？你們這些凡人是誰？這裡是剛打過仗嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","尊貴的瑪亞特，很榮幸來到妳面前。這裡是開薩東邊的避世金字塔。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","才剛不久，妳似乎受到某種邪惡力量控制，我們早先見到的幾位神祇也是那樣。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我們來自港口區。這些英雄則來自遠方，是來幫助我們阻止賽特的。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","嗯......我全想起來了。我被賽特誘到這裡困著，再之後呢......則不大清楚。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","太丟臉了。我以為他終於改變......多謝你們協助，凡人們。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","你們被封印在此，事實已很明顯，最近凱密斯的居民已嚐到失去秩序的痛苦。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","這真糟糕。我重新出現，很快就能稍微挽回局面。這場混亂的始作俑者是賽特。"
"story.season.s5_province_33.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","說到這一點，我們見過的神祇都有這樣的共識。我們會盡力阻止他。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","解救了瑪亞特之後，一行人離開避世金字塔。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","接下來該去哪呢？這座金字塔之後，我們沒有收到任何指示。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我也從未跨越這個地點。盲目繼續前進，似乎有些不智......"
"story.season.s5_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","各位好！不用擔心，你們的嚮導回來啦。這一次，還是該往東走！跟我來。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","芭絲特！我們無論到哪裡，妳好像都在。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","的確！不過，這樣的安排很快就要結束，只剩最後這一小段路程，你們的旅程不久即將劃下句點。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","做得漂亮。看來你們凡人已經做好萬全準備，可以找賽特比拼。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們正有此打算，同時卻也不知該如何打敗那些再次甦醒的木乃伊法老。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","啊，這部分啊，你們就不必操心了。只要能妥善地打敗賽特，就能釋放他們。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","先等一下，我們先體諒那些不幸的靈魂，他們的行為並非出於自己的意志。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","那種感覺一定非常糟糕：從來世被強拉回來，違反自己的意志之下遭到利用。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","幸而，聽說那些法老只是被施咒，並非真的那麼瘋狂。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","又究竟有誰會真想被不死的木乃伊統治？"
"story.season.s5_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","統治......儘管始終有缺陷存在，凡人卻總是為了它的形式和執行者而抗爭。"
"story.season.s5_province_34.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","即使如此，也必須允許他們自行選擇。賽特的做法是不能接受的。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","只有我有這種感覺，還是空氣確實突然變得有些......凝重？冰冷？我不知該如何形容。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我懂你的意思，已經有一會兒了。那是一種寒冷......感覺非常奇怪，我不喜歡這樣。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","真是觀察入微！我們確實已很接近賽特的邪惡城堡。你們確定不會回頭嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_35.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","當然不會。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","太好了。你們表現出來的力量，使我相信你們已做好萬全的準備。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","不過，前頭的挑戰非常艱鉅。賽特的兵力大半駐紮在前頭的金字塔。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","糟糕！名副其實排山倒海的敵人在等著我們！"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","沒錯。只有越過那支軍隊，才能靠近賽特，和他不死的法老將領。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","太教人沮喪！局勢必然超乎想像的艱難！"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","芭絲特......"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","怎麼？我只是想跟這些凡人說些鼓舞士氣的話！"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","無論如何，我們都會勇往直前。未給凱密斯帶來和平，我們誓不罷休。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","瞧，有效吧！好，既然已經確定，我得先去處理一些緊急事務。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","等等，妳要離開？"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","放心！你們自理一下下，不會有問題的。"
"story.season.s5_province_35.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","也是。凡人們，我們很快就會再見面的，祝你們幸運囉。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","那些賤民總算到了。我們準備去迎接他們。復仇的感覺會很美好。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","恐怕你太過樂觀了喔。應該先瞧瞧那個害蟲能不能追上我們。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","確定不需要把我們未來的子民去掉臟腑？把他們改造一下，不是很好用嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","亞赫摩斯，傲慢無禮是一種可怕的病。必須趕緊改掉，以免害能幹的僕從挨罵。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","這我很認同。我挺期待早日用我自己的眼睛審判他們......"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","可惡！"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","到這個地步，我不敢說是否真能打敗這些木乃伊，沒法一直壓制住。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","而且我們還沒見到賽特。阿努比斯說他會出現......"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","先別鬆懈戒備。薇薇卡，妳有主意嗎？"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我覺得──"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","歡迎各位凡夫！我很期待你們到來。關於我的提議，考慮得如何？"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","很難從命，但你也該露面，別一直躲在幕後。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","可惜。我許你們更好的世界，你們卻想送死。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","哈！我很樂意滿足你們的心願！"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","那，我們只好就此一了百了。朋友們，大家全力以赴吧！"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我們有辦法贏他嗎？他這一次看起來更可怕......"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","忽然間，眼前出現一群熟面孔。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","什麼！？"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","英雄們──放心！你們並非孤軍奮戰。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","我們凱密斯的神來助你們一臂之力啦！"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","眾凡夫！果然不負重望，你們表現優良。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","阿努比斯！伊西斯！我們讓這些可憐的生靈好過一些吧。這個盜賊就交給我。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","阿努比斯──"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","明白。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","兩位神祇開始釋放木乃伊的靈魂。亞赫特波、特提舍麗和亞赫摩斯逐一停止不動。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","很好，不用等多久，其餘的木乃伊也能脫離這個惡魔的心靈禁錮。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","賽特──你跟荷魯斯的恩怨儘管不關我們的事，但你這次的對立確實過分。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","不..."
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","不！！！"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","恭喜！一切都很順利，大家同心協力，太好了！"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","芭絲特，多謝妳出面協調。本島已恢復和平......至少目前。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","是的。也願從蘆葦平原拖出來的那些故去已久的死者能迅速回歸應到的去處。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","英雄們，實在太感謝你們了。你們的恩情，凱密斯永記在心！你們將名留青史。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","不過，賽特造成的傷害並無法一夜之間消失......"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","唉，的確是如此。我們可能還需要請你們出一點力。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","只要是需要我們的時候，我們都願意回到這個世界。我們也並非第一次這麼做。"
"story.season.s5_province_36.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","我們先回開薩報告這個好消息吧！這一次，可得辦場盛大的饗宴才行！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","歡迎各位蒞臨亞特蘭蒂斯王國！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00_choice_02","「我不會做出選擇的」"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","又一波攻勢結束，現在我們要再次舉起我們的三叉戟了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01_choice_00","「我選A。」"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01_choice_01","「B選項明顯比較好！」"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","為亞特蘭蒂斯歡慶！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","亞特蘭蒂斯比賽正式開始！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","眾人熱烈歡呼。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","看來七大洋的人們都齊聚一堂了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","感謝各位來此共襄盛舉。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","今天可是我們海族最重要的日子之一。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","跟我說說亞特蘭蒂斯比賽的事吧。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","參賽者需要做些什麼？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我們會為亞特蘭蒂斯的榮耀而戰！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","聽起來是很適合你的比賽呢，理查德。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","小心，喇沙可是現任冠軍。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","真的嗎？他看起來連劍都揮不動！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","走吧！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00_choice_00_result","這是A選項的結果"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.0.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00_choice_01_result","這是B選項的結果"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.18.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這些傢伙是怎麼回事？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.18.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","牠們有點似曾相似。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.18.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","沒錯，這裡有些不大對勁。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.18.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","他們讓我想起尤塞娜的小兵。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.18.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","你說什麼？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.18.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","沒時間解釋了，牠們要逃到深水裡去了！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.18.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","跟著牠們！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","不會吧......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","這看起來很不妙。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","這群耶戈十分驚人！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","通常來說，他們是很弱的。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","這是因為他們被暗黑力量強化過了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","就是我們過去擊敗的那股暗黑力量。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","現在怎麼還會有尤塞娜的腐化殘跡存留下來？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我不清楚，但我們得向艾利爾和波塞冬警告這件事。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","真不敢相信你能在海裡用大錘揮出如此猛烈的力量。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我可是有練過的啊！哇哈哈哈！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","恭喜你們！真不愧是拯救過亞特蘭蒂斯的英雄們。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","他們打敗了尤塞娜？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","那這樣就說得通了！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","理查德大笑，拍拍他隆起的二頭肌。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","我們並非靠一己之力，而是一路有眾人鼎力相助。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","你們拯救了陷於水深火熱之中的亞特蘭蒂斯。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","這可是我之前也沒能倖免於難的危機。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","外面傳來一陣騷動。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","這裡發生什麼事了？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","火山島嶼的耶戈魚人似乎在皇宮外製造混亂。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_01.9.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","我們最好去看看。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","英雄們返回了亞特蘭蒂斯"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","有什麼消息嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","情況比我們想像的還糟。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","尤塞娜遺留的腐朽依舊存在。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","尤塞娜不是揮之不去的腐朽主因，年輕的朋友們。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","啊，嘎拉啪果！你知道什麼內情嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","是的，陛下。在擊敗尤塞娜後，我的確對腐朽進行過研究。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","這是來自最黑暗深淵的全新邪穢之物，對我們王國造成極大影響。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","那我們就得阻止其繼續惡化下去！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","是的，我們可以從亞特蘭蒂斯底下的深溝開始，也就是尤塞娜過往被囚禁之處的附近。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","時間緊迫，我們得趕緊動身！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","祝你們好運，勇敢的英雄們！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","哇！我從未這麼深入亞特蘭蒂斯下方呢。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","這整個地方都被腐朽給侵蝕了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","曾經囚禁尤塞娜的神奇波塞冬可是非常強大的。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","一定是深淵散發出來的黑暗影響削弱了魔法封印。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","所以有另一股邪惡在幫助尤塞娜？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","如果是這樣的話... 那就太駭人了！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我不確定。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我們應該深入探查一番！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","嘿！我找到某樣東西了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","是古代神器，讓我仔細瞧瞧。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","深淵裡有許多我根本未從聽聞的謎團。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","看我拿走它！這東西現在是我的了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","不！那是我們的東西！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","魚人遊走了..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","趕緊追上他！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","站住，小偷！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","嗚呃！我不行了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","把神器交給我吧！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我本來可以把那東西高價賣出的。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","來仔細瞧瞧吧。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","呃，嗯..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","似乎是一張通往神殿的地圖，神殿就隱藏在深溝的洞穴中。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","真好奇我們能否找到任何深淵寶藏。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","看來我們抵達神殿了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","如果我不是一名勇猛的戰士，那我一定會覺得這地方令人毛骨悚然。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","小心，這裡有別的生物！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","的確，入口似乎遭到破壞。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","保持警覺。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","有人在嗎？！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","請小心，陸上之人，這座神殿非常古老，之中潛藏許多危險..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","這裡暗得伸手不見五指。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","別擔心，孩子，我是這座神殿的看守者。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","你似乎是明事理之人。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我們正在調查來自深淵的腐朽源頭。而這件神器引領我們至此。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","啊，非常好。你必須將神器歸還至神殿中心。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","是這樣的，這座神殿是一道屏障，將存在於深淵黑暗縫隙的夢魘困在這裡，以免夢魘重見天日。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","但自從神器遺失以來，腐朽就愈發強大了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","走... 隨我來。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這座神殿比我預想的還大。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","在萬古以前，這座神殿曾有過成千上萬像我一樣的看守者。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我讀過這類神殿存在的故事，但我一直以為只是傳說。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","是的，我的前任者們世世代代避免這座神殿的地點曝光..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","烏沃查克斯示意隊伍往前移動。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","請，我們就在內部聖所的附近了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","這人讓我感到毛骨悚然。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","對啊，可別放鬆警戒了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們到了..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","將神器放在基座上吧。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我有不好的預感。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我不知道我們還有什麼選擇。如果我們現在打道回府，線索就斷了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","艾琳娜將神器放置在基座上。房間轟轟作響。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","做得好。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","現在甦醒吧... 女王。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","毀滅吧..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","我是諸海的唯一統治者..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","拿起武器！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","你是怎麼擊敗女王的？！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","熟能生巧。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","你是諸海的真正敵人。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","你最好乖乖道出一切。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","尤塞娜的記憶湧入艾琳娜的腦海中。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","艾琳娜！妳還好嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","你們將隨神殿一同毀滅。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","神殿轟轟作響，開始沉入深淵。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們的英雄現在位於沉沒神殿遺跡。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","喂！有人聽得到嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","拉薩爾！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","你有看到其他人嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","沒有，我只知道神殿沉沒了，我們都被困在這個暗黑洞穴裡了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","來吧，我們得找到其他人！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","理查德！拉薩爾！這邊！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","你們沒事真的是太好了。艾琳娜人呢？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","艾琳娜就在這邊。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","............"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","她從神殿崩塌後就沒有回應了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","這裡仍很危險，我們應該前往安全的地方。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","同意。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這地方的路可是很難找的。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","就我的專業推斷，我覺得我們應該非常接近深淵的中心。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我只希望裡面別那麼黑！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","也許我能幫你。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","是那個小偷！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","冷靜點！我知道我們對彼此的初始印象不太好。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我沒有惡意，而且能幫你從這個裂縫中脫身。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","看來我們別無選擇。我們迷路了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","跟我來！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我在哪？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","艾琳娜！你醒了！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我記得我最後是在跟烏沃查克斯戰鬥。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","神殿沉沒了，我們在那之後，就迷失在這些裂縫之中。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我不知道是為什麼，但這地方感覺很熟悉。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","你是說？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","我們需要更加深入。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","那麼我們就會進入黑暗的中心。我建議你們別這麼做。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","相信我，我想我知道該怎麼阻止威脅亞特蘭蒂斯的腐朽之力。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","啊，冒險的刺激感讓我興奮起來了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","賈可，照亮前方的路！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","嗯。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","深淵的壓力讓我們開始擔憂了起來。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我不確定這是不是出去的路。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我不知道為何，但這方向讓我想起......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","......家鄉。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","艾琳娜，妳還好嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我沒事。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我們最好繼續前進，現在沒理由走回頭路了。我們很快會找到浮出水面的路。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們真的離水面越來越近了嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","感覺我們在深淵待了很長時間了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我很想念清澈溫暖的水域......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","艾琳娜倒下"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","艾琳娜！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我沒事，我馬上站起來。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你看起來狀況很糟糕。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我可以繼續前進！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","我們幾乎就要到家了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","什麼家？！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我來看看......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","艾琳娜，你眼睛的顏色好像在改變。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","退後，我們沒時間磨蹭了。敵人來了！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","在海底上有一座巨大的城市。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我還真難想像會有這麼大的龐然巨物就隱藏在此。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","哇！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","這裡是深淵首都。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","城市......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","它似乎在召喚我......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你是故意在這段期間內將我們引到這裡的嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我認為在神殿時，艾琳娜身上發生了一些事。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","也許答案就藏在這座城市中。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","希望下面沒有陷阱等著我們。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們一路打到深淵，但仍找不到答案。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","有強大的生物靠近。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","來訪者們......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","希望我歡迎你們的方式不會太過粗暴。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","你是誰？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我是蓋斯托特，深淵王子。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","雖然你們可能不知道我是誰，但你們一直都在與我戰鬥。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","你是說？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","所有碰觸過深淵之物都將產生連結，最終超越個體本身。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","這就跟尤塞娜用來控制亞特蘭蒂斯的咒語一樣。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我不會稱之為咒語。這是萬物成為更強者一部分的集體需求，這種需求能將思想聯繫在一起。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","事實上，你們其中有人已與強大心智產生連結。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","啊，是你！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","艾琳娜！小心！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","你是叫艾琳娜嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","我將粉碎你，以及你對她下的任何咒語！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我們完全無法對他造成損傷......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","哼！我還以為能打敗我姊妹之人，會更有能耐的。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","艾琳娜，你身上携帶著尤塞娜所僅存的精華。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","若你屈服，就能擁有無上的力量。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","事實上，你也能跟我們一同創造新的世紀。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","她不會屈服的！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","等著瞧吧，她很快就會的。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們終於抵達深淵皇宮了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","就是這了！現在到了大殺特殺的時候了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","保持警覺，我們將會面對極大的阻礙。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","..."
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","啊啊！我的頭......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","艾琳娜陷入了回憶"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","你這傲慢的蠢蛋。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我們與生俱來擁有引領新時代的權利。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我們將合為一個永生實體，強大無比。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我是深淵女皇，深淵永生者。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","蓋斯托特，我不需要你所說的那些幻想。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我擁有至高無上的力量。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","你的力量隨著你的自滿而不斷消弱。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","我認為你在眨眼間就會屈服於丹米維特斯的力量。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","你膽敢提起丹米維特斯！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","蓋斯托特嘲諷般笑著"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","不......你現在連亞特蘭蒂斯的波塞冬都打不過。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","我會讓你說不出話來......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","艾琳娜的回憶結束"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","我們沒時間了，艾琳娜迷失了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","最終，蓋斯托特向尤塞娜發出挑戰，逼迫她接受流放。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","尤塞娜認為如果她掌控了亞特蘭蒂斯，那她就能獲得足以挑戰蓋斯托特的力量。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_18","如果我們放任蓋斯托特的話，他將使用力量緩慢地吞噬萬物。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_19","我在記憶中看見了被稱為丹米維特斯的存在。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_20","這裡不適合說話，我們繼續前進吧。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","丹米維特斯是什麼？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","丹米維特斯是古老邪教的至高存在。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","丹米維特斯的崇拜者會試圖切斷所有意識鎖鍊，就為了成為丹米維特斯的一部分。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","學者們從沒把丹米維特斯的傳說當回事，因為沒多少學者願意花時間了解深淵。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","所以這有可能是真的？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","是真的。召喚丹米維特斯是蓋斯托特的最終目的。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","尤塞娜想要擊敗蓋斯托特，是因為她懼怕蓋斯托特正在灌輸進這世界的力量。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","一開始，她在試圖拿下亞特蘭蒂斯時被波塞冬囚禁起來。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","但當蓋斯托特的力量與影響在深淵中越發強大時，她也不斷壯大，並得以掙脫並征服亞特蘭蒂斯與波塞冬。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","你是怎麼知道這些的？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","艾琳娜解鎖了尤塞娜剩下的記憶。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","這代表再過不久，尤塞娜的記憶將會吞噬她的心智。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","我可以再撐一陣子。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","我們必須阻止蓋斯托特。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","噢，偉大的王子！我希望能向您稟告，召喚終於開始了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","經過千年之久，時間匯聚成永恆的時刻不遠了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","英雄們闖進了最深處的聖所。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","啊！艾琳娜，你做好決定了嗎？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我做好決定了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我真的希望你決定與我親愛的姐姐的記憶一起同化。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","是這樣的......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","成就完美道路只有一條，那就是宇宙萬物合而為一。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","與尤塞娜合而為一的你，正在率先目睹新的時代。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","真是美妙啊！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","你不覺得嗎，艾琳娜？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","我不會讓你利用尤塞娜的記憶來操控我的心智。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","我們為此來是阻止你的瘋狂行徑！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","我們的朋友與夥伴，正是成就我們的助力！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","為了探究這世界謎團的自由而戰。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","為了金幣而戰！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","為了亞特蘭蒂斯而戰！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","我們都有各自的理由，但我們將齊聚一心來對抗你！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_18","沒有人能在戰勝了世界跟自身之後獲得任何好處。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_19","那就這樣吧......讓我看看你們的決心。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","結束了......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","艾琳娜，你感覺如何？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我感到無比清醒，看來我得救了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","太棒了！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","朋友們，該是回到亞特蘭蒂斯的時候了。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","不久後，在亞特蘭蒂斯"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","勇敢的勇士們！你們又一次幫了亞特蘭蒂斯大忙。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我們將永遠感激不盡。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","我真不敢相信在亞特蘭蒂斯之下還存在著不同的世界。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","我們解開了深淵的謎團。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","那個曾被認為是傳說的謎團。這趟冒險真可謂是滿載而歸。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","我們也擊敗了吞噬世界的永恆存在。"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","這已經不是厲害能夠形容的了！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","說得沒錯，拉薩爾！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","我想知道的是，接下來誰會成為深淵的新主人？"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","......關於這件事......"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","與此同時，在深淵首都中"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","哈！"
"story.season.tales1_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_18","完結"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","朋友們，你們來了！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","世界樹受到威脅了嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","喔，並沒有！阿斯嘉這裡一切都很好。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","其實，我想介紹你認識一個人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","很高興見到曾經拯救九大王國的英雄。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","他是瑞京，來自尼達維爾的矮人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","很高興認識你，請問我們能夠怎麼幫助你呢？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","有個小小的家庭爭執需要你的幫助。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","我兄弟與我和我的父親之間出了問題。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","什麽樣的問題？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","父親想要和我們斷絕關係，並且將他的財富全部留給自己。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","我們可以怎樣協助你呢？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","是這樣的...我們希望你去偷瑞京他父親的黃金。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","我認為你很勇敢，非常適合這份工作。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","我知道這聽起來很卑鄙，但我向你保證這是為了顧全大局。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","我父親已經藏著這些黃金數百年了。我想用這些黃金來幫助尼達維爾的市民。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","這聽起來是一場冒險！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","我就知道你能夠勝任這份工作。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","尼達維爾要往這邊走！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我從沒聽說過尼達維爾。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我想也是。沒多少人有聽過..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","在斯瓦塔爾法海姆和尼弗爾海姆冰川之間，有兩個隱藏的王國。我住在尼達維爾，那裡就算沒有比穆斯貝爾海姆更熱，至少也有一樣熱。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","然後還有米爾克海姆，這是一片富含黃金，但和尼弗爾海姆一樣結凍的土地。雖然米爾克海姆是矮人的國度，但是除了開採黃金和礦物之外，沒有太多人會花時間待在那裡。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","真是太有趣了！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我迫不及待想親眼見見這個地方。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這裡的路很危險。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","雖然我們還沒到尼達維爾，但各式各樣的火焰生物已經開始在這些平原上漫步了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","這就是為什麼沒有太多遊客拜訪矮人國度的原因之一。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","另外，我們擁有的熔岩地對於大多數來自其他王國的生物來說，往往十分致命。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","由我們去阿斯嘉做生意比較方便。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","如果尼達維爾就像你說的那麼熱，那我們要如何在那裡生存？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","噢，別擔心！我知道該如何確保你的安全。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","可惡的瑞京！我們下次再打過。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","她好像不喜歡你。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","安德瓦里會回心轉意的...她只是怪我害她失去了魔法戒指。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","你跟那件事情有關係嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","我也是不小心涉入其中，我只是把戒指拿給洛基看。是洛基想用魔法把安德瓦里變成一條長矛，然後..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","所以洛基把戒指拿走了？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","嘿！如果要我說的話...是安德瓦里把戒指在河裡弄丟的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_01.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","這件事情就先別提了！尼達維爾正在那座山丘的另一邊呢。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","瑞京，你能告訴我更多關於安德瓦里戒指的事嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","你想知道些什麼？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","如果安德瓦里希望取回戒指，那代表它一定很強大。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","一定是！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","戒指名為安德華拉諾特。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","擁有它的人必定榮華富貴。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","煉金...改造魔法?"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","你說點鉛為金的力量？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","不是......沒那麽神奇。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","安德華拉諾特能讓持有者洞悉商機。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","未卜先知！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","想像一下！僅僅只是買賣蕪菁，你就能跟國王一樣坐擁金山。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","真不可思議。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","瑞京！父親想要你回家。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","喔！是你，奧特......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","瑞京......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","如此叛逆之舉可不適合你。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我們被父親棄之如敝履。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我不會像你跟法夫納那樣在他面前卑躬屈膝地祈求他憐愛。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","兄弟就該齊心協力！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","但你不聽從勸告，我就不會停手。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","隨你吧......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我早該知道我無法打敗你......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","......但我能拖慢你！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我們會再見面的！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","嘿！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","他跑掉了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","你在這似乎不怎麼受歡迎。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","因為我這盜賊實在太帥了，當然會惹人厭囉。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我想也是吧。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","我們不該在這浪費時間。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","我父親的黃金正等著呢！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們已經進到熔岩之地的深處了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","溫度變得越來越難以忍受。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","別擔心！這種情況不會再變得更糟了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","對我們外來者而言，這是最安全的一條路。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","尼達維爾的人民是如何禁得起如此炙熱的高溫呢？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我們用了核心科技強化了心臟。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","怎麼可能！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我研究過由核心驅動的魔法構造體。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","你們是靠什麼方法掌握了如此神秘的科技？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","我們都是大師級工匠，任何魔法科技都樣樣通。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","你一定得好好分享筆記給我看。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","抱歉......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","這些都是超級機密的商業秘密......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","......這份蘊藏超級機密知識的書卷給你，但可千萬別跟人提起。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.20.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","我好興奮啊！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我要求你將戒指還來！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","安德瓦里，我的朋友！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","只是我想見的人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","瑞京，別跟我開玩笑。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","你要不立即歸還我的戒指，就是給我等價補償！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","「等價補償」會是什麼？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","嗯......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","一百萬金幣！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","我活千輩子也無法賺到這麼多錢......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","......更別說我是個長生的尼達維爾人了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","那就納命來吧，無賴！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","安德瓦里，你夠了沒？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","走開，你這惡棍。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","我們之前可是朋友......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","你不該因為一點誤解而毀了這段美麗友誼。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","瑞京，我們不是朋友。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我會向國王提出正式申訴。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","國王會處理你的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","呸......"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","真要說的話，我父親會要求安德瓦里之戒。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","我們到尼達維爾還要多久？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","我們幾乎快到大門了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","我們到了之後，要偷偷進去，別被抓到。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","你什麼計畫嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我們到那就知道了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","你確定嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","我對城市大門瞭如指掌。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_02.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","相信我吧！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","快看！我們快要到我父親的寶庫了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","比我想得還要容易。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","那時我以為我們偷溜進大門時會被發現。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我們就在他們眼皮子底下偷摸了進去。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","瑞京，你比我當初誇你的還要足智多謀。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","嘿！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你們是誰？！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","糟糕..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","這不是你們該來的地方！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","這下被發現了..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我猜我們得一路打進去拿黃金。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","如果我們夠快，仍可趁我父親的守衛集結之前把黃金帶出來。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.0.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我們走！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","兄弟！別這麼做。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","奧特，我們不用非得打打殺殺的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","你就讓我過去，然後彼此假裝沒看到對方就好。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","如果你現在轉身就走，那我們的確可以這麼做。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","趁我們的弟弟出現前快走吧。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我沒法這樣轉身就走。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我已經決意要帶走父親的黃金。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","不管阻擾我的是誰都沒用。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","奧特！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","法夫納..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","奧特，做得好。你發現了闖入者。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","瑞京，你是我哥哥。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","你不該做好該有的榜樣嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","我知道你跟我一樣，都想要父親的黃金。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","一派胡言！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","奧特！埃斯勒高爾！立刻抓住這廝！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.11.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","遵命，主人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我想我們甩開他們了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們被強大的敵人給包圍了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","沒錯！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","瑞京，有什麼計畫嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","法夫納危險至極。我們最好全力避開他。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","附近有通往寶庫的秘密通道。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","王國目前高度戒備，那是我們現在最好的選擇了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","守衛知曉秘密通道的存在嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","我不這麼認為。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","我甚至不認為我父親知道這件事。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","我們以前小時候常常跟奧特在那裡玩耍。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","奧特會預料到你會走這條秘密通道嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","只能希望他別想起來有這條路了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我們在這是在浪費時間。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.16.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","我們別無選擇，現在就得快點行動！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","還真是令人意外地簡單啊！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我就知道走秘密通道是對的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","所以這些就是寶庫囉？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","看起來比較像是充滿窄小通道的迷宮。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","沒錯，尼達維利安的黃金寶庫就是龐大的隧道網。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","很經典的矮人發明，不是我在吹牛。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","現在，我們在這左轉，然後..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","噢嗚！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","嘿！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","哎喲..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","小心看路！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","安德瓦里，你們在這做什麼？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","還有..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","...父親..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","瑞京，我對你很失望。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","我之前對你未來的成就抱有很高的期望。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","父親，我這麼做是為了尼達維爾！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.17.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_18","我得掐滅你對我的黃金的愚蠢念想。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","瑞京，你已經逃不掉了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","你那貪婪的計畫就到此為止。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我們被包圍了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","收手吧，外來者。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","投降的話，我們會讓你們返回到你們的王國。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我們費了很大的心力才走到這一步，不妨豁出去打一場再拿著黃金逃走吧。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","你說如何呢，瑞京？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","你說得沒錯！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","父親，我會讓你知道真相的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","法夫納，抓住他們。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","法夫納！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","為何你什麼都沒做？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","我們機會來了！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","尼達維爾的黃金與財寶..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","...全部..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","全部都是我的！而且僅屬於我！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","父親..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","聽著，你的子民正飢寒交迫。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我們得用這些黃金救濟需要幫助的人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","黃金是我的..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我受夠這場鬧劇了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","埃斯勒高爾，拿下我的父親。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","哈啊！！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","嗚啊！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","父親！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","他真是愚蠢。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","黃金我就拿走了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","埃斯勒高爾，召集我們的人手。我們要前往我在米爾克海姆的宮殿了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","遵命，主人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","赫里德馬爾王..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","...國王受傷了，但我相信我能救他。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_18","謝天謝地！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_19","安德瓦里，你真是我的好朋友。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_20","我們不是朋友..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_21","嘻..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_22","安德瓦里，你說的都對。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_23","請照顧好我的父親。我要去追法夫納了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_03.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_24","米爾克海姆，我們來囉！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","啊！新鮮空氣，風兒自由吹過！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","對比炎熱的尼達維爾，這裡有著不同的風景。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","歡迎來到米爾克海姆！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","趁現在好好享受吧，天很快就會暗下來，溫度也會驟降。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我覺得現在已經很冷了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我們得去找個地方取暖。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","附近應該會有個米爾克海姆探索者營地。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我們先去那地方吧！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","我們辦到了！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","在我們朝米爾克海姆深入之前，這是個絕佳的補給機會。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","不錯，米爾克海姆的冰寒荒地對來訪者可不留情。準備萬全總沒錯。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","你知道法夫納的宮殿在哪嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","很遺憾，我不知道..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","...但我曉得有人知道。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","那會是誰？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","要說誰最了解米爾克海姆，那肯定是說書人斯諾理。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.10.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","我們早上去找他吧！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","站住！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","說說你們來米爾克海姆的目的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","我們是來找斯諾理的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我聽說他住在這附近。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","這裡沒人叫斯諾理。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","離開吧！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","這不就是從我們踏入米爾克海姆開始，就一直在攻擊我們的那群人嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","他們看起來的確很眼熟。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","你們為什麼要跟過來？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","不關你們的事。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","你們別想再繼續前進了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.16.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","準備戰鬥！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","斯諾理？！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","有人嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","是誰？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","是我，來自尼達維爾的瑞京赫雷達松。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","我在找說書人斯諾理。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","哎呀..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","自第一首傳奇傳唱開始，從沒有過皇室訪客來找我。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","需要我幫什麼？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","赫里德馬爾王遭法夫納所背叛，而我們正在追尋其下落。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","瑞京告訴我們說你知道他的宮殿位置。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","我曉得很多關於米爾克海姆的事..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","...但我無法幫你所求。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我僅知道法夫納的宮殿就位在米爾克海姆核心地帶。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","在寒意流淌，吞沒大地的深處。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","一定有到那的方法。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","你知道什麼能幫助我們的情報嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","抱歉，年輕人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_18","你確定嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_19","幫助我們，就能得到價值連城的東西..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_20","你在說什麼？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_21","故事，我的朋友！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_22","只要你幫我們，就又有另一則好故事可以說了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_23","真是有趣的提議啊..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_24","我能帶你們到達米爾克海姆核心地帶。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.20.onlevelcompleted.dialog_25","你絕不會後悔幫我們！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","終於找到你了，瑞京！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","奧特，你在達米爾克海姆做什麼？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","仔細想想，我根本沒空管這個。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","那當然！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","你襲擊了我們的父親並偷走他的黃金..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","...所以，你現在高興了？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我看起來有穿金戴銀嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我全身一半凍僵，靴子也濕了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","而且，是法夫納襲擊父親並拿走黃金的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","你說謊！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我會把你押回尼達維爾受審。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","聽我說，奧特。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","我們正前往米爾克海姆核心地帶。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","法夫納背叛了我們所有人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","我當時只是想偷父親的黃金而已。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","儘管我們關係不好，但我從沒想過傷害父親。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","瑞京，我很想相信你。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","但這很困難..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","..法夫納..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","奧特，你大可以幫我們。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","米爾克海姆危險重重且寒冷又陰暗。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","我們需要各種協助。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","我會與你們同行。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我得跟法夫納談談。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_04.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","兄弟，很高興你加入我們。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","此處的冰封峽谷將通往米爾克海姆的險地。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","我不曉得...什麼樣的危險渴求會促使人探索如此的險地。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","有人早已探索過這荒地了！除此之外，還在核心地帶建了一座要塞。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我們會找到那座要塞，並將你父親的黃金帶回給尼達維爾人民。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","謝謝你，我的朋友！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我誠摯感謝你們一路上的不離不棄。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","各位！在這呢。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","這似乎是條安全的小徑。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","我們動作快點！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我從未如此深入米爾克海姆。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","冰封走廊之後又是冰封走廊..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","就如同迷宮一般。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","是藏匿偷來黃金的絕佳地方。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","法夫納從一開始就打算要背叛父親嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","也許..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我一直在想這事。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","為何法夫納要在米爾克海姆最偏遠區域建宮殿？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","是我的話，我寧願在尼達維爾附近落腳..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","...除非有什麼特別的理由。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","沒錯！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","等會我們再繼續聊。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","前方有敵人出現！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","他們在那！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","你們的旅途結束了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","依照法夫納王的命令..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","...篡位者瑞京與其盜賊黨羽必須立即投降。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","法夫納才不是國王！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","赫里德馬爾才是米爾克海姆與尼達維爾的國王。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","沒有黃金，赫里德馬爾什麼不都是。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","沒錯！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","快快投降，向真正的國王跪拜。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","也許他會因為你是他的兄弟而網開一面。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","想都別想。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","準備戰鬥！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","瑞京，這是最後通牒。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","給法夫納傳個話。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","告訴他跟黃金說再見。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","我們耐心有限..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","特里瓦爾迪，來教訓一下這個毫無榮耀可言的崽子。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","埃斯勒高爾！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","你本是皇家守衛的一員，如今背叛了自己的王。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","你沒資格說榮不榮耀。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","哼..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","...赫里德馬爾是個軟弱的國王..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","原來就是你攻擊父親！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","若你不乖乖投降..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","...那就死吧！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","他們夾著尾巴逃走了！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","如果跟著他們，就很有機會找到法夫納。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","太好了！我們終於能結束這一切了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","瑞京，我想為之前誤以為是你攻擊父親而道歉。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","雖然我是我們兄弟中最年長的，但我一直都很敬仰法夫納。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","他一直都很值得信賴..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","...我總是認為若我能像法夫納多一點，父親就會正眼看我。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","父親一直很自負。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","他真正在乎的是他的黃金。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","完全不會在乎自己的兒子們。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","話雖如此，但他一直對我很好。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_05.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","...我也很喜愛他。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","這是法夫納的宮殿？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","肯定是..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","真不敢相信米爾克海姆竟然存在這樣的地方。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","這地方散發著極其邪惡的詛咒氣息。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","好像不該來這裡的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","我們不該逗留。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","瑞京，有什麼計畫嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我們要聲東擊西，在法夫納的士兵分心時與他正面對決。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","要是我們奇襲法夫納失敗該怎麼辦？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","那..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","那就隨機應變！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","隨機應變？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","兵法曰：「亂而取之」。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","我相信無論發生什麼，我們都會安然無恙的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","哈哈！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","面臨危險還是一如既往地泰然自若啊，瑞京。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.0.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","我們去找我的兄弟吧！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我們還沒完全暴露行蹤。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","很好。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","噓！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","躲起來！有人來了..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","我聽說有入侵者。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","是的，瑞京和他的盜賊夥伴已經悄然潛入宮殿中了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","所以我的兄弟一路跟著我來到這..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","找到他，並把他帶來見我！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","其他同夥就隨便你處置。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","遵命，主人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","我想他們已經離開了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","法夫納有些不對勁。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","我現在才感覺到..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","我也感覺到了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","是的，你說的沒錯。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","壟罩這座宮殿的詛咒正是從法夫納身上散發出來的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","我們應該小心點。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","是時候執行計畫了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_18","斯諾理和奧特，你們兩個可以在我們跟蹤法夫納的時候引起騷動嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_19","沒問題！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.10.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_20","好！我們開始跟蹤法夫納！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","法夫納！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","瑞京！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","守衛！？他們在哪？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","看來奧特引起的騷動發揮效果了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","這是我們抓住法夫納的機會。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","不會有改變的..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","我會親自擊敗你。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","你寡不敵眾。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","放棄並回到尼達維爾吧。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","兄弟，你別不識好歹。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","你們根本沒有機會戰勝我。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","我有安德華拉諾特。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","安德瓦里的戒指？！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","我還以為在洛基那裡。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","洛基把戒指作為禮物送給我。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","什麼？為什麼他要那麼做？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_16","洛基認為是時候迎接尼達維爾和米爾克海姆的新國王了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_17","有意思..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_18","這戒指有什麼隱藏的力量嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_19","安德華拉諾特不過是個能讓持有者變得富有的小小飾品。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_20","不應該有其他力量啊。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_21","說夠廢話了！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","什麼..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","...我不可能這麼輕易就被擊敗的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","該回去尼達維爾了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","呃。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","還有，你竊取的那些財富，現在都被沒收了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","不..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","不！！！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","他用手捏碎了戒指！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","出事了！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","所有人趴下！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","呃啊啊！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","我要打倒你！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","瑞京！小心！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","喔不！我躲不開攻擊..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","快阻止法夫納！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","啊嗚！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","奧特！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","哎呦！可真疼。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_18","可悲啊..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_19","沒有任何人可以拿走我的黃金。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_20","他就這樣走了？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_21","奧特，你還好嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_22","一點小傷而已，沒事的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_23","你救了我。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_24","沒什麼大不了的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_25","我終於見到法夫納的真面目了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_26","我不能讓他傷害我的兄弟。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_27","...謝謝你。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_28","我感受到一股深深的詛咒之力。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_29","發生什麼事？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_30","法夫納捏碎安德華拉諾特後變身了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_31","這聽起來不妙啊。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_32","我會待在這照顧奧特。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_33","你得阻止法夫納。不能讓腐化詛咒從這座宮殿擴散出去。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_34","我們馬上行動！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.19.onlevelcompleted.dialog_35","一起了結這件事吧！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_00","我要你聚集我們的軍隊並準備進軍。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_01","遵命，主人。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_02","拿下尼達維爾後，就盡快前往密德嘉。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_03","遵命。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_04","法夫納王的統治時代終於來臨。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_05","現在離開吧，我要回到財寶的所在之處了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_06","給我停下！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_07","我們會阻止你的計畫的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_08","為王國，也為我們的朋友！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_09","你們..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_10","你們這些人渣就是不肯放過我！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_11","埃斯勒高爾..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_12","特里瓦爾迪..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_13","毀滅他們！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_14","為了所有你傷害的人..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelbuttonclick.dialog_15","我不會輸的！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_00","結束了嗎？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_01","法夫納已經落敗了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_02","...兄弟。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_03","那是什麼？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_04","是安德華拉諾特。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_05","那東西我就帶走了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_06","詛咒之力正從戒指褪去。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_07","我們帶上黃金返回尼達維爾吧。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_08","幾天之後..."
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_09","你們這趟冒險刺不刺激呀？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_10","那當然！精彩程度可不是三言兩語就能說罷的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_11","洛基，你為什麼要給法夫納安德華拉諾特？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_12","我可是戲法師洛基呀。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_13","我想這麼做應該會起到很有趣的效果。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_14","法夫納差點就要入侵密德嘉了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_15","如果發生這種情況的話，我很肯定索爾跟夥伴們會出手的。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_16","...但什麼也沒發生，我也就不會擔心了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_17","下次見。朋友們。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_18","哈哈哈！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_19","我終於趕上你了，瑞京。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_20","安德瓦里，我有樣東西要給你。拿著。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_21","什麼？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_22","...等等，這是我的戒指。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_23","這戒指最好還是交給你保管。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_24","謝謝你。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_25","謝謝你，我的朋友。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_26","尼達維爾和米爾克海姆回歸平靜。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_27","我很高興我們能幫上忙。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_28","你打算怎麼處理那些黃金？"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_29","我會回到尼達維爾，和奧特一起用這些黃金幫助我們的人民。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_30","父親還在恢復，所以我們會照顧好他。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_31","看來尼達維爾的復興就要開始了。"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_32","我們會盡力的！"
"story.season.tales2_chapter_06.27.onlevelcompleted.dialog_33","完結"

"towerevent.level_requirement","達到[#!]經驗等級{0}[#]可解鎖高塔活動。"
"towerevent.rules.towermagic","[#!]魔法高塔[#]的目標是盡可能攀爬到高塔頂峰，並且盡力得到最高分。活動結束時會依照排名，發給玩家專屬獎勵。


魔法高塔特色

魔法高塔的所有關卡都有[#!]魔法詛咒[#]。若未及時摧毀魔法書，你的一個英雄會受到[#!]魔法詛咒[#]。英雄受詛咒[#!]{0}[#]次之後便無法再參加魔法高塔戰鬥。但是，魔法族類的英雄（巫師、術士、德魯伊、牧師）可以抵抗[#!]{1}[#]次詛咒。

完成某些關卡後，你可以選擇[#!]庇佑[#]，為所有英雄加強能力。在目前活動的剩餘時間內，庇佑會一直為你所有的英雄提供增益，幫助他們進行魔法高塔戰鬥。


魔法高塔得分

排行榜排名是以抵達的[#!]最高樓層[#]為準。兩條任務線的分數（[#!]普通[#]和[#!]極難[#]）會[#!]加總[#]。如果玩家抵達的樓層相同，則依照個人在每層的[#!]累計分數[#]決定排名。分數由打敗的敵人數量、完成速度與關卡結束時英雄的剩餘生命值來決定。大連消與超級配對也會被計算在內。

過關後[#!]無法重玩[#]。"
"towerevent.rules.towerninja","[#!]忍者高塔[#]的目標是盡可能攀爬到高塔頂峰，並且盡力得到最高分。活動結束後會依照排名，發給玩家專屬獎勵。


忍者高塔特色

忍者高塔的所有關卡都有[#!]邪鬼詛咒[#]。若未及時摧毀邪鬼石，你的一個英雄會受到[#!]邪鬼詛咒[#]。英雄受詛咒[#!]{0}[#]次之後便無法再參加忍者高塔戰鬥。但是，忍者家族的英雄可以抵抗[#!]{1}[#]次詛咒。

完成特定關卡後，你可以選擇一項[#!]庇佑[#]來增強所有英雄。在目前活動的剩餘時間內，庇佑會一直為你所有的英雄提供增益，幫助他們進行忍者高塔戰鬥。


高塔活動得分

排行榜排名是以抵達的[#!]最高樓層[#]為準。兩條任務線的分數（[#!]普通[#]和[#!]極難[#]）會[#!]加總[#]。如果玩家抵達的樓層相同，則依照個人在每層的[#!]累計分數[#]決定排名。分數由擊敗的敵人數量、完成速度與關卡結束時英雄的剩餘生命值來決定。大連消與超級消除也會被計算在內。

過關後[#!]無法重玩[#]。"
"towerevent.rules.towerowl","[#!]貓頭鷹高塔[#]的目標是盡可能攀爬到高塔高處，並且盡力得到最高分。活動結束後，會依照排名發給玩家專屬獎勵。


貓頭鷹高塔特色

貓頭鷹高塔的所有關卡都具有[#!]貓頭鷹詛咒[#]。若未及時摧毀貓頭鷹石，你的一位英雄就會獲得[#!]貓頭鷹詛咒[#]效果。英雄受詛咒[#!]{0}[#]次之後，便無法再次參加貓頭鷹高塔戰鬥。但是，貓頭鷹家族的英雄可以承受[#!]{1}[#]次詛咒。

完成特定關卡後，你可以選擇一項[#!]庇佑[#]來增強所有英雄。庇佑是一種在目前活動的剩餘時間內施加於你所有英雄的增益。


貓頭鷹高塔得分

排行榜排名是以抵達的[#!]最高樓層[#]為準。兩條任務線的分數([#!]普通[#]和[#!]極難[#])會[#!]加總計算[#]。如果玩家抵達的樓層相同，則依照玩家在每層的[#!]累計分數[#]決定排名。分數由擊敗的敵人數量、完成速度與關卡結束時英雄的剩餘生命值所決定。大型連消與精彩的配對也會影響分數。

成功過關後[#!]無法重玩[#]。"
"towerevent.rules.towerstyx","[#!]冥河高塔[#]的目標是盡可能往下攀爬到冥府，並且盡力得到最高分。活動結束後，會依照排名發給玩家專屬獎勵。


冥河高塔特色

每隔[#!]{0}樓層[#]，[#!]{1}族類的英雄會無法用於戰鬥[#]。然而，冥河家族成員皆能隨時加入戰鬥！

冥河高塔的所有關卡都有[#!]奪魂[#]功能。若奪魂到期，你的一名英雄就會[#!]受到傷害[#]。然而，[#!]若你有即時成功配對[#]奪魂，即可脫離奪魂，並會[#!]提升[#]目標英雄的生命值！

在冥河高塔中，你也能獲得[#!]庇佑[#]！完成特定關卡後，你可以選擇一項[#!]庇佑[#]來增強所有英雄。在目前活動的剩餘時間內，庇佑會一直為你所有的英雄提供增益，幫助他們進行冥河高塔戰鬥。


冥河高塔活動得分

排行榜排名是以抵達的[#!]最高樓層[#]為準。如果玩家抵達的樓層相同，則依照個人在每層的[#!]累計分數[#]決定排名。普通和極難樓層的分數會加總。

你的[#!]分數[#]由擊敗的敵人數量、完成速度與關卡結束時英雄的剩餘生命值來計算。大連消與優秀配對也會被計算在內。

過關後[#!]無法重玩[#]。"
